content: Headspace was one of my all time favorite apps. I still use it at least once a day, however since the addition of Ebb the AI Headspace has added, the app functionality has gotten worse. It takes forever to open and often crashes despite downloading all the updates. Additionally, you used to be able to download much more content to use offline that I really enjoyed when I travel. I had high hopes that a mediation app like Headspace would be safe from Enshitification, I'm not so sure anymore.
subscription only
it is a good app but recently it is crashing a lot does anyone have any idea about it?
it ask subscription for every freaking vdo 🤡
sudden price increase, doubled cost, no in app notification of this change only found out after subscription renewed

While the app was fantastic, WHY ON EARTH are you collecting data and I quote from the new Privacy Policy "when [I] send or respond to emails, messages, chats, or other communications from Headspace" you collect "any personal information [I] include in the body content of [my] communications." to "power machine learning algorithms" (AI) and "personalise adverts". This is such a philosophical contradiction to what this app seems to be about. A greed driven breech of privacy. Uninstalled it.
with each update it is becoming more and more buggy. It crashes way too often and the lag before playing a session is way too much and irritating especially for a app meant for mediation
I've paid such a high amount for this app but it keeps crashing mid session. Completely breaks the rhythm and concentration.
completely paywalled and 50 quid subscription for a year. very overpriced and not worth it.

initially gave this a 5 star review, however the app is so buggy it's at points unusable. Frequently won't connect to Internet despite other apps are working in full signal, and when it does connect, takes ages to load. Would be great if headspace team could look to improve functionality of the app...

already subs but unable to access any session. its been a week. ive been a loyal user since 2023 but this is the first time I have this problem with no change, even after I uninstall and redownload it few times
99.999% of all content is locked behind a paywall.
Incredible app. I get free headspace as a teen and it has really helped me look at the world more positively. 10/10.

Agree with recent negative reviews below - for an App requiring a paid subscription it peforms really badly. Very slow and buggy and most frustratingly after latest update offline downloads don’t work anymore on Android. I mainly use downloaded content to help me with sleep but now it won’t play without internet. Completely counter-productive! Tried all fixes — reinstall, cache clear, re-download — still broken. Not acceptable for a paid app, especially for sleep use.
practically unusable.

I have been stuck on an endless loop trying to log in to my old account. It logs me in on the webpage, tells me to open the app and then logs me into the app with the wrong credentials, with no option to enter the correct email address. I now have to idea how to log in to cancel the free trial. Con artists.
wonderful, magical healing and mindset regulator. love ❤️ 😍 💖

I had been a longtime user of this app and absolutely loved it. I had also recommended it to plenty of people back then but have lately been discontent over the ui. It has way too much content and is super cluttered. For me, Headspace's most basic offerings were and are its most powerful ones. I loved the easy navigation, succinct courses and guidance. I would sincerely urge the developers to make a simpler ui. Most headspace users won't be swayed by new content added every month.
Sometimes, when I was using the app during a meditation, it just stopped.
all features behind paywall
you do have to pay for everything but the app is good
Downloaded the app and I can get past the introductory screen and 3 breath exercise, tried multiple times to restart the app but it didn't work.

highly disappointed. I was recommended this app by a specialist, only to find that to access anything, I have to either pay a yearly subscription or monthly of $19.95. Once I discovered this, I uninstalled the app. No way can I afford another expense, especially when I downloaded the app to help me relax.

Beware, they advertise a 14 days free trial, but I was charged the annual subscription immediately. I had to use Google policies to get a partial refund. Besides that, the app is extremely frustrating, very slow and constantly crashing, even during meditation ! (on a Samsung Galaxy S22)

Avoid this app. But if you want to get it anyway, be EXTREMELY careful as Headspace wont send subscription reminders, and if you are charged they will fight tooth and nail to keep the money no matter what. I got hit hard with a yearly subscription, that they refused to refund. Extremely scummy move considering for whom the app is catered to. Also the AI enshittification is making the app drop in quality significantly. STAY AWAY if you can, there are better alternatives out there.

This app is not easy to navigate. If you want to try the free app, it forces you to click free at the same time as subscribe. The 2 are not separate. Then you cancel anytime, another hassle. Try for free is not the way it sounds. Horrible horrible experience.
why is everything locked 😟

this app used to be great. the last year it's gone downhill. customer service isn't great anymore either. I had 3 issues, one was addressed, 2 weren't despite me following up. one was that i was advised of a renewal premium and then was charged a higher premium. so disappointing now from what it used to be
daily necessity for a calm experience

Scheduling appointments are easy, but every other provider I've seen virtually sends a text message with a link to the session 10 minutes prior. Headspace only sends a push notification that's easy to miss, which I did. It also seems there's no phone number to call and quickly resolve issues, so this has just been a bigger headache when all I wanted was support.

Absolutely pathetic. I've purchased a 1 year subscription for an app that is completely unusable. The app is ubearably slow, often freezes mid session and my downloads randomly dissapear. And that's if you can even log in! If your purchase is older than 65 days you can't get a refund, so I've paid almost 60 euros for a years worth of acces to a complete garbage app, great work headspace team.
You been vibe coding this or something? Over the last few months the app has become slow and unresponsive... worked brilliantly when I first signed up.

Meditations themselves are varied and super nice! Really reccomended it to whoever is new to mindfulness and would like an introduction to use and incorporate it into daily life. App interface and stability is getting better with latest updates. Would be nive if there was a feature to reset your progress within a mediation pack, even if you haven't fully completed it yet. Sometimes a meditation is cut off mid session due to connection issues by the app and i have to restart it.
I don't want to pay if I need a lot of help and I don't have money I am only 12 and I have a lot of exciting and ADHD an my mom said she is not paying for it 8
Good app, but please please make a setting to turn off the haptic feedback when I press on buttons. I really don't like the sensation when I'm trying to relax.
think positive
Sick people feeding off sick people, makes me sick.

Too expensive. And getting them to verify official documents to get the student discount? Impossible! SheerID rejects pretty much anything uploaded from a cell phone claiming its not official. You can't use your student email to verify, you have to upload a document. Why use a verification site that won't verify me by my school provided email and rejects every document uploaded? Thanks HeadSpace... guess I won't relax. School isn't stressful or anything..🙄
Quite literally everything has to be paid for. Nothing is free and I think that should be mentioned in some way

The content deserves 5 stars, and it's become an important part of my toolkit for managing either anxiety or nights where I can't sleep. However, the app has become very unstable lately - eg: if I play any track, I then have to clear out the cache before I can play anything else, otherwise I get 2 mins of audio before it crashes and infinitum. It also crashes when I jump to YouTube or a music app, or when I try to download anything for offline listening. Severely downgrading quality of the app
Content is great The app is getting worse with every update, it's pretty bad... Soon I'll have to find an alternative 😢

1 extra star as it could be and used to be pretty good but it has long since stopped syncing with Google Fit no matter what I try and now crashes mid session during most attempts to use it. Basically the app has been bricked by recent updates. edit 3/26: Another update and once again everything stops working. Just roll it back to the version from 12 months ago and then leave it alone!

The app is back to being good now that they've fixed the lag and crashing from the design update (at least for me). However, I still feel the app looks very busy now and reminds me of social media which I'm trying to avoid the stimulation of when getting on Headspace. The simpler layout was better, faster, and easier to navigate.

Changed phones and can't log in - asked for help, support has been working on it since January. The app creates new profiles based on email addresses if you use the wrong one and although they can bill you through Google play, they can't figure out how to get you logged into your account. I've had this account for +5 years.

Having concluded email Headspace support this past week, it seems there's no way to see or opt out of a coach using an AI chatbot when replying to me as a Headspace Care member. So I believe I will have to not use this for more than its existing content library because - beyond what I said and got back in above threads - I would have to disclose more particulars about what my friend circles are like than we're comfortable possibly having sent to such AI tool companies I can't verify at all.
used to be gold, now bought by Blackstone. bloated, buggy as hell, waste of money. another victim of rampant capitalism...
Worked perfectly fine while I had a free trial to it's premium features, but lost access to EVERYTHING since cancelling it. I can't use a single feature now that I've cancelled my trial.
crashes during sleepcasts. 1 star. it's a quite recent issue, late 2025 i guess. im on android s22. please fix it, and ill change rating to 5 star which it usually deserves.
The app has lots and lots of technical problems
Not as useful as I thought... so far.
Nothing works the way HR describes. There is no EAP, no new parent coaching. I removed it.

Your latest update yet again nuked my download section, it's all empty while the apps is taking up 4gb data. So those downloads are still there just not being listed. It frustrates me a lot that this happens regularly with the updates. Also why would you only let a user set very random set timers, 5 min or 500 min, How about let the user decide when the music should stop? it's freaking loop music anyways. + You can't make a playlist. Such basic futures but you didn't think about any of them.

Predatory app. Slow, messy UI and superficial content. Super hard to keep track of anything in the app. Gave up on it, never received an email before my subscription was extended. Contacted them immediately, explained that I am ill and unable to work at the moment, but they still refuse to cancel the extension. Wastes your time, stresses you out and leeches your money, so about the opposite of what anyone looking for a meditation app needs.

It's a damn good app with a huge library of sounds, meditations, useful mental health support routines, and plenty to be listening to when you need help getting to sleep. Unfortunately the app is HORRIBLY unstable, and it's not a big help when you wake up in the middle of the night, try to use the app for help getting back to sleep, and having to mess around with forced stops, resets, and cache clearances. A five-star app with one-star reliability.

Both me and my partner have had problems with this app. It sometimes just stop playing the audio randomly, which has the opposite effect of what the app is aiming to do! Then randomly it might start again many minutes later. very poor!

I have been a subscriber for years and have enjoyed this app and it's content. In 2026 I have experienced multiple app glitches that have ruined my user experience. Meditations stop several minutes in, courses do not automatically proceed to the next session, or I get logged out of the app mid meditation. All have been escalated to support with no solution besides "we are working on it keep your app updated to the latest version" for several months. I will not be purchasing another subscription.

2nd update: another week later. I have been reduced to using the YouTube meditations because I can't use the app. I loved the app and content for 6 years, but how much more can I take?! Update update March 2026: A week later, and I still can't use the app I paid a yearly subscription for. It won't let me open anything. It keeps saying "error you already have a subscription". I logged in and out and uninstalled the app. please help!

The app is not worth the subscription. It barely functions and sessions are constantly interrupted by pauses and skips. Some of the content is helpful but most sessions can be found for free online. The app settings also default to sharing and selling your personal data including information for targetted ads which is disappointing.

I used to love this app. The meditations are great and really help me to get to sleep. I have been using this app for about 2 years with no issues until just before Christmas when it suddenly started switching off mid meditation. As soon as I unlock the app it starts playing again but this is not relaxing. Sometimes it stops playing during my sleep meditation and I cba to get up and put it back on, but then it turns back on randomly in the middle of the night and jumps me awake. Not a happy user

I downloaded this app because of issues with anxiety. Although not a 'fix all', the yoga exercises, mood music, bedtime stories, and all the other things offered really helped to neutralise and ground when my anxiety was getting bad to the point of freezing. I paid for it since it was about the price of a coffee out per month, and it has definitely been worth it

When it works it's fine. I'm having an issue woth the app where it shuts down anything I'm listening to due to a playback error. Everything is updated but it still stops playing. I'd rather get a refund of the membership than deal with this over and over again.
Great lessons, many options!

Ever since the app was updated to this new prettier version reliability has been in the toilet. Reliability is massively important with an app like this. Meditation sessions contain long silent periods. It's impossible to know with one's eyes closed during a session if a gap in audio is temporary and part of the exercise or the result of yet another crash. The old app worked every single time. This one is whack and will likely lead to me not renewing my subscription.

It's not possible to relax or be immersed when you're constantly wondering if every bit of silence is an intentional pause in the audio or the error message coming up for the hundredth time. If I had known about this issue I would not have renewed a yearly subscription for an app that is by no means cheap.

options of music and meditation are great but I paid an anual fee to be able to listen to them for as long as I want to yet none of them play for more then 2 minutes. Contacted support but no resolution was offered, only way to use it it's through Youtube directly as the App works for only a minute. Disappointed as I try to used it every day for different occations without any success
what if someone doesn't have money?
Worst app!

I have been using the app for a long time. The content has always been good and helpful. However, I feel the app is being filled with clutter and I find myself going to the same meditations over and over that I did 6 years ago. My biggest complaint is technical. This app takes a long time to load anything, and it is not rare for the app to crash, especially during an activity. In all honesty the app has always had some technical issues. It is not getting better and I can't understand why.
playback keeps stopping giving an error message. this is AFTER the most recent update. this is NOT a cheap app, this bug needs to be fixed. it has been like this for months.
Track cuts off during the session.
replyContent: Thank you for reaching out. We are sorry for the trouble. Please send us a note to help@headspace.com and we'd be happy to assist further.

content: ｡ﾟﾟ･｡･ﾟﾟ｡ ﾟ。 ｡ﾟ ﾟ･｡･ﾟ ︵ ︵ ( ╲ / / ╲ ╲/ / ╲ ╲ / ╭ ͡ ╲ ╲ ╭ ͡ ╲ ╲ ﾉ ╭ ͡ ╲ ╲ ╱ ╲ ╲ ╱ ╲ ╱ ︶ my daily poetic therapist.
over half my yearly subscription was waisted as the app didn't work properly, even after I tried everything support suggested. they refuse to refund.
For past 2 months I put on sleep music and cuts out after 5mins every night. I have had this app for over 3yrs. Just started doing this past 2months

This app used to be great prior to like 6 months ago. Now, it stops 1 min after starting a soundscape even when the app is set to allow background activity, SUPER SLOW to open and load anything, buffers constantly even with good internet connection, and will crash in the middle of trying to navigate the app. I've been a customer since 2019 and I'm actually thinking of canceling my subscription and moving to a different app because it irritating me so much.

I have been using this app for close to 10 years exclusively for meditation. While the content is great with many types of meditations with great guides, the stability of the app has taken a nose dive in the last 4ish months. it will often interrupt the meditation without any notifications. i sent a note to support and got the following back which I cannot verify yet but wanted to share. a possibility is the app /battery optimization might be killing off the meditation, so disable it for HS.

I really wanted to love this app..and I believe I would have done but unfortunately it kept crashing on my phone. Motorola E15. I'm wondering if it's my phone that's not up to spec. it isn't a good phone. the app looked and felt okay and I managed to get a few things to work which I enjoyed. no fault of the app here.
so slow and the support is beyond awful
Was great but has been glitching and freezing lately. Even after following the steps recommended about battery saver settings. Won't connect to Google fit properly either.

After paying for a month, cancelling, and receiving confirmation of cancellation, Headspace has taken more money from my account. When I have tried to resolve this, they claimed they couldn't help me and I needed to ask for a refund through Google Play. However, suspiciously, Headspace took the payment directly from my account that time and not through Google Play. So I am stuck with a payment having gone through but no access to service.
Laggy even for downloads

I've been using this app for several years now and recently the loading time has increased significantly, maybe as a patience exercise but I just find my self leaving the app and doing meditation on my own, I would appreciate it if you could improve the loading time and decrease it, thanks for the years of good experience.

Fantastic meditations, theme and guides but they're held back by an incredibly frustrating app experience. I've been a happy subscriber for a few years but these last shoddy updates have made the app consistently fail to load, frequently crash, and overall work against us as users. I really hope the team at headspace gets things back in order.

App never plays fully through any meditation anymore, it always cuts off a minute in and says error, not aure whats going on but its been one problem after another for a while now. I had to stop using it at night because it never finishes the meditation only plays for 30 secs.

1/28/26: still happening 1/2/26: the app keeps closing and giving me an error. I tried emailing support about it but it didn't work. it's really frustrating because i use this app to fall asleep and it keeps turning off within 5-8 minutes of starting.

is nobody talking about where you have to pay $73 to have the subscription for this type of app? That is so crazy to me, like who's about to pay all that money for a app to calm you down, that's just so so crazy, I give this one star because it just kept on charging me even after I canceled the subscription, I'm sorry but I'm not paying that much money for this app. although I'll give you this, the experience I had with the app was pretty good.
Lots of material but constantly crashes. Not relaxing when you have to restart a mediation three times.
Lovely app to help you learn to meditate. This is money well spent for anyone who'd like some guidance on meditation.

I just renewed my subscription in every night I have to uninstall and reinstall the app in order to listen to the Sleepcast crashing. Is anyone else having this issue? I hate that I paid so much and I can't even enjoy the app like I used to!

The content in this app is phenomenal. Andy’s delivery is calming, personable and makes it easy to settle into meditation. Unfortunately, this is undermined by frequent app crashes, often daily during guided meditation sessions and not realising it has crashed until you check with this breaking focus and increasing frustration, defeating the app’s purpose. @Devs please prioritse app stability over new content so the app fulfills its designed purpose and onboard a UX who actually uses the product

Seit dem letzten Update ist die App zwar schöner und aufgeräumter, meiner Meinung nach. Allerdings sind die Ladezeiten bis der Startbildschirm jeder Option in der Menüleiste unten so lange, dass es wirklich stört und nervig ist. Ich hoffe das wird schnell behoben. Ansonsten liebe ich die App und sie macht es mir einfach, die Meditation als Routine einzubauen.
Plays for 2 minutes then stops. Message on screen says "sorry something went wrong" used to work fine, now does this all the time. Tried uninstalling and re installing, same issue. Samsung S22 Ultra.

I used to love this app. I've tried a lot of the courses. But recently it has been so slow and crashes constantly. Today ALONE it crashed during a simple 3 minute meditation and 3 TIMES during a 6 minute meditation. I've started becoming angry and frustrated during and after attempted meditation...which clearly defeats the point in meditating at all...
Love the content, but app has not been working at all since last update. I cannot play any of the content and there's no errors to troubleshoot... very annoying.

i would love this app if it actually worked. ive used headspace on and off for years, and it was an incredible tool for me at first and helped me manage my depression and anxiety in a very effective way that helped me change my mindset. BUT in the past two years, every time, and I am not kidding, EVERY time I try to do a meditation, I get an "oops! something went wrong" message and I can't complete any of the meditations that used to help me so much without interruption. Im very disappointed.
There's still for improvement and it's still getting paid
Keeps interrupting sleep casts because of "no Internet connection", which is false. no option to download casts. Utter rubbish.

AVOID - THIS APP IS NOT FIT FOR PURPOSE - IT'S AN ANGER GENERATOR !! With so many bugs it will frustrate you so much that for your own peace of mind, you will stop using it ! Technical Support just keep advising me to delete the app ( the latest version), reboot and then download the latest version of the app - this does not resolve any of the issues!!!! Don't waste your money, time or temper!

Customer service via zendesk is awful. I have reached out via email and chatbot several times to attempt to work out why I have been billed and yet cannot access services. I recieve a reply from zendesk but when I reply there is complete radio silence. Not exactly the meditative state I had hoped to find myself.
doesn't work. full of bugs. you use the app for stress relief and then it doesn't work, it only makes you more stressed. unlucky they aren't even trying to solve anything

1 star for the bugs that keep interrupting my meditation halfway through and make the episode Crash.. otherwise I love headspace but I feel like the bug crashes are almost part of the meditation exercise - stay calm stay zen but actually they're getting annoying.. pls fix them

I have had a paid subscription to Headspace for years & it used to be great - but now, like SO many others have reported, the past couple of months the app is horribly glitchy - loads slow, randomly stops during sleep stories and meditations with a message that simply says oh no, something went wrong, or looks like you're offline. This the ONLY app that I'm having any issues with. Customer service is not helpful. Headspace needs to admit there's an issue and step up to fix it.
Doesn't sync with Google Fit, interface is terrible. Content is ok.
No longer syncs with Google Fit, this is a known and reported issue that has not been resolved for months now

Updated review 2026- App cannot play a meditation without losing internet connection. Definitely not my wifi or phone. I have realized I've fallen off my meditation practice because of this over the last couple of months. Sad but I'll cancel because I am no longer using daily meditations or using it to sleep. Original review in 2017- 5⭐ Really nothing to critique at all. Well paced and lots of options after the first 30 days. An exceptionally different sense of my day - it really works!
Can't use it unfortunately, every session crashes a minute or so in. I'll be trying to meditate the. suddenly wonder why nobody has said anything for a few minutes... check my phone and it's crashed.

I have been using Headspace for years but now it won't work on my Samsung A54. It just stops after 10 mins. I have reached out for help but it still isn't working and it is weeks now. I need my headspace! please please sort it
replyContent: Thank you for reaching out. We are sorry for the trouble. Please send us a note to help@headspace.com and we'd be happy to assist further.

content: Sadly since Headspace rebooted their app it has gone down hill. The app takes forever to load and each meditation experience crashes. It's a real shame - it used to be such a positive experience.
the app was great. with the new update meditations, esp. the sleep cast ones are shutting down midway on their own. extremely annoying
Content of app is good but the app can be incredibly slow to open and lags alot. Not really acceptable for an app in this day and age - especially one you are paying for.
It crashes ALL THE TIME. I use it to sleep and can't have more than 3 minutes without it crashing
content is loading very slow and the app is hard to navigate. Considering that I am paying a monthly fee, my expectation was higher

Bad & a lot of crashes. Norrmally, I came to Headspace every now and then to get back to challenge my mind with meditation. Now I am challenged by the app. Constant crashes during meditation and a UI that is not intuitive at all. First I thought, let's download the sessions, but NO. Even after downloading, I get crashes. BUT HOW?! Never ever will I come back again for Headspace. They literally went from 5 to 2 stars. they deserve the second star for their broad catalogue.

app has become terrible over the years. so bloated, slow, and just doesn't load half the time when I open it to the point I just do it from the browser and don't even use the app anymore. it was so much nicer pre ~2019 when it just focused on meditation. now it's trying to be everything for everyone and it just sucks now

keeps crashing . downloading option doesnt work takes a long time to load up sometimes or doesnt load at at. its useless some of the courses on there sound so patronising. the american ones, it feels like an cheesy ad andy is great. but he sold out
just a money waste

Not the same app! I've used this app for 3 years through my employee subscription without any issues. I recently switched to a individual subscription and have had issues with the app crashing after 2 minutes of using it. This happens everyday when I attempt to use the meditation feature. I'm paying for an app that I can't even use for longer than a few minutes. I'm really disappointed and hope it can be resolved!
content is very good however the app keeps crashing. i try to open a course to start meditation to relax and the app stops and exit. i hope the app get's fixed.
keeps crashing

I have a subscription to this, mainly for sleep casts. however, recently it's started cutting out every few minutes with a message of "it looks like you're offline". So I have to pick my phone up, click the dialogue, and move the audio tracker back to approximately where it was. This actually annoys me to the level that it's better off me not using it at all. No other stream on my phone suffers this, just Headspace. Will be cancelling my sub unless it improves.

loved this app when i first downloaded it, i pay for it and now in the last 2 months it keeps stopping after a few minutes into soundscapes or meditations. very disappointing - ive deleted it and re downloaded it and still does not work. i want a refund
used to love this app but it's turned into a money grubbing machine that doesn't care about you anymore. beware an app that has an AI 'therapist'

Headspace would be great, but unfortunately the current version of the Android app is terrible, almost unusable. The app is for some reason now slow and laggy, although the previous version worked smoothly and there were no lags. And worse yet, the streaming frequently just stops due to some obscure error ("Something went wrong"), which interrupts and ruins my meditation. These problems have persisted for months now. It is extremely disappointing to be paying for this!
Latest version is very glitchy- meditations stop playing, even when downloaded. I have to keep reinstalling, and I've a paid subscription.
Really great content but so unforrunately spoiled by a slow app that loses connection mid meditation and loads at snail pace.
loved for a long time, now my NHS account has stopped it just keep buffering and closing down, really poor performance.
app is slow and expensive. not worth time or money
refuses to sync to google fit
While I LOVE Headspace I hate the app. It glitches, is slow and sleepcast aren't playing the full audio. randomly shutting down during the early part of the story.

good resources but buggy. I like some meditations, but the app lags a bit and often the meditations stop playback randomly due to 'play error' which is annoying. Also the app is super confusing, and lacks a customisable home page, which daily use apps like this benefit from. And why the AI?!

Borderline useless. This app used to be amazing. Updates (from months ago) have destroyed it. Constantly crashes. Takes an age to load (or crashes) then will just fail a minute into the audio. Constantly having to force stop, clear cache and start again.

I have been using this app and even have a subscription. Was working good and I was getting used to it. But lately, like everyone else, it crashes after two minutes.Saying that I'm offline when I am not. even on the downloaded content. I hope you guys fix this problem soon.You guys are losing people over this.
app crashes

App isnt working properly. If i had my choice again i wish id chose a different mindfulness app. it is constantly crashing freezing or only plays a few minutes of a meditation or sleep music then stops and says 'oops something went wrong'. ive tried reinstalling and signing in and out again but this doesnt make a difference. my signal is perfect and even if it was that ive downloaded individual episodes and it still crashes. I want my money back.

I used this app for quite awhile then took a break the last year and came back and it is now garbage. confusing to figure out what to do, have to click 6 times what used to be 2 clicks. headspace ruined their app.
it's soo slow, every page takes so long to load!!
Constantly get "something went wrong" on all audio which completely snaps me out of any meditation so I've given up 🙄
sleep stories keep crashing and going oh dear, somethings gone wrong! no option to report it just a button to go to the previous screen, it keeps happening. sort it out please
love it so much.... the app however is full of bugs it keeps stopping meditations saying there's no Internet and not loading. needs some fixes

several things on the app in terms of the white noise and binaural beats work intermittently even if you have those tracks downloaded. this is the main function I use in the app and it becomes annoying when paying money but having intermittent access to the features you like.

was previously was 5 stars, updated to 1. recent update has bricked this app, it switched itself off after 3 minutes which deems any meditation or sleepcast useless. customer support has mostly been AI and not helpful. no timeline to fix issue, no suitable workarounds, no willingness to publicly admit that there is a known issue.

Very buggy and slow to load since the "redesign." Loading the home screen takes ages now, and my go-to sleepcast will stop playing after 60 seconds some nights. Leaving the screen on seems to help, but I had never had this happen previously. I'd rather they focused on user experience than AI, especially when we're paying them for it.
Terrible it is like it does not anymore
no longer syncing to Google fit. critical for any of us with vitality insurance. used to work great.

I love this app but it is buggy. currently, I get a message pop up saying I'm offline and can only play certain content - despite the fact that I'm online and am playing content I haven't downloaded. the error message cannot be gotten rid of either. it'll disrupt video. hover over my stress check ins - meaning I can't do it. it renders a lot of app functions useless. please fix this asap. been an ongoing issue for 4 months.
A £50 meditation app that takes a minute to load a simple UI and crashes halfway through a meditation. Shockingly poor quality.
I love the app but it glitches a lot during using it. It will crash sometimes once or twice during meditation and sleep casts.
used to be great but now glitches with every use

Excellent customer support. I was like a lot of other reviewers having issues with the app not working, specifically during mediation it would stop playing once my screen locked. I emailed their support email and got a response within an hour or 2. The email communication was prompt and super helpful, and now the app works fine. You need to adjust your phone's battery app settings if you're having issues and it will solve the problem. or reach out to their support email, they are great.

Have loved using Headspace, especially the focus music and soundscapes (originally gave a 5* review) but the last few months have been frustrating- the app is constantly freezing and glitching making it hard to complete a session. Customer service team suggested using the website whilst they try to fix but it's not the same interface and experience. Really hoping they get it sorted, but I'm unlikely to renew my subscription in April unless it's fixed because currently it's too unreliable.

For a few months now the app will crash about 75 seconds after playing, claiming I'm offline. I have to close the app, turn off the WiFi and mobile data, turn it all back on again and then it will work. Not a very relaxing experience.

content is great when the app works. most of the time the app doesnt open on the first, second or third time. Content stops due to 'no signal' but my wifi is fine - especially annoying when using the sleepcasts
WORST experience ive had with an app. It simply never works.

This app is now completely terrible. I am just venting really as I see many others have left a review about the same issue of the app just cutting out mid meditation every time. I contacted the customer service, did everything they said and it is still the same. It is such a shame as it used to really help me with my anxiety and insomnia issues, now it just makes them worse. It has been like this for over a month now, will it ever be fixed?
works great until it keeps freezing for hours on end, takes minutes to load options, or just blacks out. reached out to support and instead of helping me they offered a refund - very disappointing

I wish there was an option for gentle music behind the meditation leader's speaking. And I wish they would tell you when it's over so I know it's the end and don't think it's just another pause. I wish it were easier to find just short meditations and I don't like the constant prompt to "check in."
I didn't want to do this painful review. I like you a lot, because I've watched the Netflix series. But you must warn that a PAID account is needed to access the services featured in this app.
Hello Devs, Would you mind checking why the app suddenly stops working in between a meditation or music session. A paid user should not have to go through this.
keeps jamming!
the guided meditations and breathing exercises are great. the app itself is lagging, freezes and just has a generally disappointing user experience

Have to force stop and reopen the app several times just to get it to load, and thats only if I have the patience. I won't use it, which is unfortunate because I really liked this app a few years ago. Too bad they don't offer refunds. Now I'm stuck paying for an app that doesn't work properly.

Frustratingly Unstable. Recently every time we try to use the sleep casts they seem to stop after 3 minutes, and requires a cache clearing to resolve. This makes the app very frustrating and unreliable, which is not conducive to good sleep.

The app is pretty unusable on my phone (Samsung). It takes forever to open and then moving around the different tabs and pages, each one takes ages. It cuts out midway through a meditation and then says no internet connection. There are so many different things it's almost impossible to find what you're looking for. I have been after decent length meditations to start the day but can only find three minute ones. Not worth the money at all.

The app stopped working: the session suddenly stops after 5 minutes, gives an error, I need to restart the session, but to stop and give an error again. I love Headspace, I am a subscriber for more than 5 years, but if it's not fixed I will need to cancel it and move to another service, as the app is not fit for purpose at the moment.
cutting out and not working way too often unfortunately.

Been using headspace for years and it has a really great library. But since a recent big update to the app layout it's just frustrating to use. Navigation is slow, every new page I have to wait for it to load. Regularly decided I'm offline and stops playing, and finding the options to play downloaded audios is a chore, why is it hidden? I mainly use it for sleep too so having the dedicated sleep tab on the bottom menu be replaced with their ai chatbot that I'll never touch did not please me.

Although I love the potential content this app offers, it crashes more often than not, and I haven't even been able to explore it fully bc it just won't load. Terribly disappointing, especially considering the cost.
Love the app but with all the added stuff in recent years the app has become extremely slow and glitchy.
it's glitchy and customer service doesn't exist. this app used to be good but since the last update it's freezing up and not working.
To many bugs...Explore screen loading too long or not loading at all and showing the home screen instead, meditation failing with an error, history showing duplicated meditation..
The fact that it become so slow, so I need to wait a minute to load a single video its stressing me out more than relaxing.
the sleep casts constantly crash

Used to be great. For weeks now, anything I play will randomly stop anywhere from 2 to 40 minutes in and say something went wrong. It started doing that right when everything started taking forever to load. 30+ seconds to load the home screen, another 30+ seconds to go to browse. 30+ seconds when I click on something to listen to. I don't like that one? 30+ seconds to load the browse screen again. This is on Wifi when everything on any other app loads instantly.

Where did this app go so wrong? Between fundamental app functionality, vague feature bloat and brutal paywalling, I feel like Headspace has moved away from it's mission. The single biggest issue is that meditations keep cutting out. This is the absolute core of the app and it simply doesn't work for me. No buffering, no pause, a hard stop and then you have to restart the meditation. And because of the silences in the meditation, you often can't even tell it's cut out.

just what is the point of a guided winding down meditation if it stops playing evry 2 minutes?! interrupting your flow and you have to start it each time from beginning again? It ends up winding you up.

Same as others have said. Used to be great but it's so glitchy and slow now it gets me more stressed trying to use it! The layout is messy and cluttered and difficult to find what you want. No one is asking for AI in a headspace app. Please give us one safespace away from it! Considering switching to another app on renewal as it's been functioning poorly for ages with no fix update.
forces you to create an account before you can view the subscription plans.

Everyone keeps saying how the app is crashing... well I can't even get INTO the app. I tried uninstalling several times. This app is been slow and buggy like this for months, such a shame they haven't corrected the issues yet. Also the UI is so bad now is to focused on AI. Please make a separate app for people who want AI / doctor/ therapist/ workout features. It's too much, please focus on what you're good at. Pull all this new stuff into a new app so we can meditate without being overwhelmed.

The content itself is amazing, but the app itself isn't great. It always buffers and takes forever to load anything. Especially when im trying to use ambience noise to go to bed and it immediately cuts 5 minutes in.
New update keeps freezing during guided meditations.
meditation itself is great but the app is painfully slow to load pages. so slow at times I just close it, at times taking a full minute or two just to load a page
In the last month it crashes mid session a lot more times than it works as it should, please fix this
always crashing, often fails to load and is always stopping midway through meditations. Paid user here and not a happy (or relaxed) person
Much more frequent crashes since the new updates. Please improve on this matter.

My daughter loves this app and uses it every night to fall asleep, but BEWARE! Last month, the app used over 5GB of data in one evening, even though we keep our mobile data setting turned off. we subscribe to data on that device since it is always connected to wifi, so it resulted in $60 of extra charges! A quick search revealed that Leads pace can suffer glitches which result in excessive amounts of data being used in the background. if you use this app, make sure you don't have data limits.

Liked it at first but the app is trash now. multiple meditations messed up because it decides I don't have internet in the middle of it (I do). on the plus side I sat for some unknown periods of time before realizing. 10 seconds to load every screen for some reason. just terrible programming, I suspect they are probably shortcutting with AI.

Ever since they overhauled this app last year it's been useless. It takes forever to load, assuming it ever does, and it frequently informs me I'm offline even though I'm not. I start sessions and talking stops a minute in with an "oops something went wrong." Yes what went wrong is your coders. You need a new development team or better yet toss out this new version and go back to the old one. It worked fine. BTW I'm a 10 year lifetime member so I've seen all the transformations.
Keeps stopping meditation in the middle of the runtime.

This app keeps trying to take $75 58 out of my account Repeatedly And I Cancelled the subscription Before the free trial period was over! be aware that they will try to Steal 75 bucks less than 2 weeks after u install this app and the trial period is supposed to be 14 days!!!! apps like this cause poor folks much more stress than they relieve lol Seriously though!!!!
app stops working - will play something for about 2 minutes and then just stops. gives me an error message that I went "offline" didnt go offline.
White Noise and Sleep Sounds don't work. Many of the Soundscapes do not work as well. App keeps crashing during middle of session so user is left without guidance.
replyContent: Hi Riy, thank you so much for your feedback! We've been made aware of this issue and are working to resolve it. Please be sure to keep your app up to date! We appreciate your patience as we determine a solution.

content: 3% meditations, 97% paywall

I've used headspace for several years. in the last single year it has become the most error ridden sad excuse of an app. it's almost ironic. I've done all of the possible troubleshooting and the app insists I have no connection. It stops in the middle of a meditation saying it lost service. you don't know this until you open your eyes to look at the app. Opening the app used to take 2-3 seconds. now it takes 20-30 and that's if it even loads! I even pre-download meditations and it STILL errors.

What has happened to this app? I've been using it for over 2 years and recently, it has become unusable. Like many people have already said, not only does it consistently say "Something went wrong" after 2 minutes, the interface is incredibly slow, and it keeps telling me I'm offline when I'm absolutely not. The app needs to work again before time is spent adding new features.
great app. but please fix the load time at start (opening the app) lately it's terrible.
this app constantly stops. I've uninstalled and reinstalled and still happens. it's a shame because I enjoy it when it does work

I've used this app for over 8 years now. I find meditation pretty life changing, and it's really helpful for me and has become part of my daily routine. The last few years it's gotten incredibly buggy and slow. Because I use it all the time, especially when I'm not doing so well mentally, it's so frustrating when the app doesn't load or a meditation crashes halfway through. This happens a lot and it's enough to make me consider leaving the app.
keeps crashing mid session and taking ages to load up. totally unusable at the moment

I think the AI feature needs to be looked at, possibly removed. Performance of this app has plummeted since adding it. having the same "connectivity" issues as basically everyone else has been having. so disruptive when your stream gets cut off suddenly. I love this app. Ive been subscribed for 10 years. please. bring it back to what it was.

this app is ok when it's working but it's so incredibly slow and buggy that it has the opposite effect of what it's whole purpose is. an app to reduce stress that actually increases it! I'm on a free membership thankfully because I would not be at all happy if I was paying for this. hasn't synced with Google fit for months despite trying various fixes, meaning I'm losing out on vitality reward points.

It's really difficult to sink into a meditation when the app is always crashing!! I don't care about AI features or therapy offerings. I care about being able to use the app's core feature. Very disappointing. I will be canceling my subscription unless this is handled.
The app is very slow and the sleepcasts keep failing.
Sorry, but this app is buggy on my Galaxy S25 Edge. Please, for goodness sake, rather than more AI, have it function first.
I like this type app 🙏👍🙌🤔👋🙋‍♂️🎅💃🪔🤗😊🤪

It used to be 5 stars but now it's a 2. Content is still good but the UI change late last year is pretty poor. Normally I don't mind app redesigns. They usually get small improvements and I adjust to the new layout. But the new UI continues to be slow to load. Not just initially but for most pages. Sometimes playback is affected, which is the last thing you want in the middle of a meditation.

Great content, but I'm not a big fan of the app interface itself. It's messy, hard to navigate and very slow to load. Sometimes I even have to close the app and open again a few times to load the content.

Very similar content under so many names and categories. I'd say almost the same. didn't really make a big difference in the everyday life for me. i love headspace. It currently keeps showing an error message though, mid-meditation and stops playing, which renders it useless. I uninstalled and reinstalled it and that hasn't resolved it. please check if there's a bug!
replyContent: Thank you for reaching out. We are sorry for the trouble. Please send us a note to help@headspace.com and we'd be happy to assist further.

content: Update 2025: I have used Headspace regularly for years and even gave it a 5 star review in 2022. But recent bugs in the app have rendered it practically unusable. Pages take ages to load, it is hard to find the content that you want and then when a mediation finally loads, an error occurs and it stops. Very frustrating! Have contacted the support but they were no help at all.

Very rich catalogue, great tools, very appealing interface, lots of gliches recently. It keeps saying "you are offline" when I am not (other apps work fine) and it gives me the error message "not responding" everytime I try and access the full catalogue. The track some times stops midway for no reason.
ķeeps crashing and saying I am not connected to the Internet when I am
it was not calming at all ALMOST EVERYTHING COST MONEY like why does it cost money to make yourself calm and happy, this was so annoying so I immediately uninstalled.
I can confirm the constant crashing of the app. I used it a few years ago and it went perfect, but now it crashes as soon as the screen lock turns on.

Application always freezes and I was unable to finish sessions. When you meditate at the morning when every minute counts it becomes awful experience. Taking into account application purpose it looks quite ironic. Uninstalled it.
you have to pay for everything in this app. It should just be a paid app instead of everything is an in app purchase. disappointing

I started Headspace in 2015 and it truly helped me heal and become a more grounded person. Back then, it was simple, yet it felt curated. Sometime around 2023 I used it less and less and I think I know why: decision fatigue. Now when I open the app, i feel bombarded with so many options, all competing for attention. Opening Headspace actually made me stressed! I will always love Headspace, but until they make the UI more calming, I may cancel when my subscription ends.
keeps clitching which is the opposite to relaxing
app is hopless crashing all the time,can't get any help with it.Very poor app sadly

The app broke and says Im offline when Im not. I opened a ticket with them and they basically said "yea we dont know why this is happening and you're not getting a refund." I read online that this is happening with other users as well.
been using it for 3 days...its the worst performing app in my phone. it is struggling to even launch. not planning to continue after 2week free trial. clearly its a trap

I wanted to try this app so I used the 7 day free trial This app wasn't what I thought it was. So I cancelled my subscription before the 7 day trial. They charged me what I am thinking is the most expensive package they have They charged me $69.99 A year worth of nothing I wanted I asked for a refund They won't do it I haven't even opened the app I haven't used any of there services I am so mad If you read the reviews they say the app doesn't even work half of the time I just want my money back
I'm not paying money to do breathing exercises👎

App performance has been awful lately. its slow to load. it's the only app on my phone that will say I have no internet connection. once it does load, sleep casts will play for a minute before crashing. will be demanding a full refund if these issues are not resolved ASAP.

pretty useless. I find much more helpful meditations on YouTube for free than any of the ones I've done here. These meditations are pretty redundant, basic, and just barely scratch the surface of what one could experience, explore, &/or heal with guided sessions. Also, the way the content library is organized feels very sloppy.

the content itself is good, however it consistently states there is no connection despite all other media platforms working perfectly fine on the same device. there is supposedly an option for downloading the content to combat this yet I have never found it in the entire year I've started using it.
The app has become really slow and buggy ever since they added their silly AI element. It just gets worse and more cluttered and unfocused the more they try to push the AI and therapy on their users.
Crashes often in the middle of a meditation. That's the most frustrating thing. There's also not a lot of new or innovative meditation content. Planning on unsubscribing after years of using.

The more it updates the worse it works. I've had headspace for years. 1) the meditations & Wake Up are all recycled; barely anything new. 2) what is "new" is new curations of the same stuff. 3) a few years ago it went in a super corporate direction, really focusing on attracting companies and suburbans. 4) with new updates it lags, loads slow, crashes often!!! 5) and disconnects consistently!!! it is nearly impossible to use. despite many reports, they aren't trying to fix it. time to move on.
constantly crashing during sessions. i am moving onto using YouTube for mediation.
poor connection to wifi from app. states app is offline every day while trying to use it. not supportive for anxiety at all.

2017: Great app. The foundation packs are a great start, and now I have subscribed there are more packs to help with sleep, anxiety, and more. 5 star. 2025: I have come back to this app, and I am really disappointed. Several times the audio just stops mid-meditation. I regularly get a pop-up telling me I am offline, yet I can access everything, and my meditation history isn't syncing with my Google Fit. I'm glad I only subscribed for a month.

This app is pointless. There one single video you can watch without paying. Everything is locked behind the subscription. According to the creators of this app you're only allowed to relieve stress so long as you pay if not then you don't deserve to be calm. I would give it zero stars if possible. Definitely do not recommend.
Very good app, really helpful, as good as Calm, if not better. Less buggy than Calm too. Helps me meditate and calm my anxiety :)
app constantly crashing and will take a long time to load, whether on wifi or data.
App constantly tells me I am offline (despite other apps working with internet). Really buggy.

Been using this app daily for 5+ years and loved it until recently. Lately my meditation session plays for a minute or two then stops and says "something went wrong" and "you're now offline" when I know I'm not. I've contacted support and followed all directions to fix this problem but it's still happening. I now have to download a meditation session to get through it without stopping by I can't figure out how to download sleepcasts. Previously 5 stars, now 1 star.
Good meditation app

this app is getting worse and worse. I love the actual meditations. the sleep content was especially important for me over the last almost 5 years I've been using it. Recently the app is starting to really fail. it takes forever to start up or doesn't at all, it says I'm offline when I'm not, and this AI therapy junk takes up a ton of space in the app. I've been paying a subscription for this app for many years now. I don't think it's a lot to ask that it actual functions. + Boo AI!

like the content, but really bad app. incredibly slow and hangs often. no what I expect from an app I used to manage stress. edit: cancelling subscription as app is unusable when I need to Samsung Galaxy s24
devs need to meditate on buggy slow app and pc interface. content ok but poorly organized and hidden behind frequent pop up alerts. i am venting, breathing in, hold, out. ok i feel better now :)

I've used this app a lot for a few years as I particularly rely on the sleepcasts and soundscapes at night time. However, lately the app has become very slow and buggy. The sound quality on a lot of the sleepcasts is very poor and soundscapes often cut out much earlier than they should. These issues have existed for a while, so it's even more frustrating that Headspace have decided to add a superfluous AI chatbot instead of focusing their attention on the basic functionality.
Great content but the app is barely functional. It now thinks I'm constantly offline and when I am able to access content, it constantly crashes. This needs fixing asap...

This is the only app that enrages me! Constantly crashing, takes ages to load, says I'm offline and stops playing, even when my connection is fine. I have used the Headspace app since the start and they have ruined it by making it so cluttered. No room for "headspace" when there's pop ups, freezes, recommendations that I'm not interested in. Some of the voices of the Sleepcasts are horrible and are really grating too. Such a shame.

The content has been great, but I had to cancel the subscription. The app constantly says, "you are offline." Whenever it worked, I put the content offline, but then when I come back the next day, the voice is completely different from the one I was using. I'm a tech guy; I come here to relax, not to troubleshoot tech issues. I found this horrible and I ended up being more stressed than before using the app.
Not syncing to Google fit Made a complaint and they are aware back in November and still not fix this issue. Not really good enough
constantly says looks like you are off line. sessions crash.

I adore Headspace as a service, but the app has been problematic ever since the most recent major UI change. What happens is either the UI doesn't load, or I'll start a meditation and it'll randomly stop after a few minutes. I delete the app's cache and data, sign back in, and it loads the old UI. Everything works perfect in the old UI. After a few days it loads the new UI without asking. Usually within a day or two, problems start again. Rinse and repeat every 5-10 days.
Love the aesthetics of the UI and so many great tools!

good content, but my experience of the app itself is poor. I recently uninstalled it and restarted my phone (as recommended in the faq), but despite this, the app is extremely laggy, and needs to be force closed a couple of times per night (I mainly use it for sleepcasts). It also just randomly stops the sleepcasts from playing, giving a connection error, despite having very good wifi in my bedroom. its becoming unusable unfortunately.
UI bad - the app is not intuitively organized, it takes forever to load some pages, help is always days away, and it keeps kicking me off my company/health provider plan.

I really enjoy headspace as a tool and benefit from the meditations and supporting my practice - but the app at the moment is awful. painfully slow, constantly crashing, and telling me I don't have any internet. I sincerely hope this can be resolved soon as it's not cheap. edit: downgraded to two stars as it's currently unusable

i have deleted the app as it has so many bugs, repeatedly cutting off meditations while i'm doing them. i have done what they suggest, deleted the app, switched phone on and off, reinstalled multiple times but it still does the same thing. such a shame because the content is excellent. i now use the web page on my phone to get to the meditations. not perfect either but at least the meditations don't crash.
It has been a little help, however it has recently started crashing a lot.

I'm sorry to be giving this rating as a user of over two years. The content is five stars but the glitches and bugs (I am an android user) have made the app unusable. Even before this latest downturn a couple of months ago which has made the issues worse and more frequent, I would regularly use my run streak aa the app wouldn't work for a day or two. I find a run streak really motivating and it would have been nice to see a full 365 days. Instead on days where it froze, I would find alternative

App stops playing or crashes constantly on Pixel 9A. Phone 100% charged, using home wifi, good 5G cell service, battery optimization OFF, and meditations downloaded, play stops once my screen goes off. Additionally, most of the time I open the app the visuals are blank and I have to wait for the app. This is terrible and I experience nothing like this with any other apps, using downloads or online content for podcasts or music. This is extremely frustrating as I have been provided a full year.
Not as many options as I'd hoped. Only a few sleep meditations.

Scammed: got a -50% on black Friday, then got an email notification on renewal at discounted price. Instead, I was charged full price. -50% is always available if you try to cancel. Finally, was denied cancellation and refund. Content is too limited and repetitive to justify a subscription.

I paid for a 1-year subscription because I wanted to relieve stress, calm my mind, and achieve inner peace. You know, the usual human delusion. Instead, Headspace starts a meditation… and then stops two minutes later with a “network connection error.” Which is impressive, because nothing says “relax” like being yanked out of serenity to troubleshoot Wi-Fi like it’s 2009. So now my mindfulness routine goes like this: Inhale Exhale “Network connection error” Immediate rage

A long time user of headspace but really not loving the change of design. The app has continued to be slow to load and crashes often. I often have to close and reopen the app entirely for it to work. The revamped lay out feels overly cluttered, harder to navigate, and do not agree with incorporation of the Ebb feature. New ≠ better.

Ive been using this app religiously since it released back many years ago. It started out simple, but lately they've add so much nonsense and inflated content that I feel it's lost it's true use and purpose. My biggest problem now is my favorite packs have to be streamed, and are constantly randomly closed during the session without me knowing during the silent moments. I've tried downloading them but I still get technical difficulties.

I was very happy with my daily dose of Headspace. But halfway through December 2025 every meditation stops playing after a minute or so, with the app saying I'm offline, which I am certainly not. Use the website, they say, sure, that works, but does not have my list of favourites accessible. I know it's the holiday season, but I'm pretty sure I'd be called back to work if the main main main flow of our application wasn't working. Why am I even paying for this?...
replyContent: Sorry for any confusion with our newest update! You can access your current pack by looking under the "Meditate" tab and browsing through your Recents section. Hope this helps, but please don't hesitate to reach out to our team at help@headspace.com if you have any questions.

content: Too glitchy. Very frustrating 'app offline' error messages that strike at random. Impossible to know if a silence is real or because the track has crashed. Tough to truly relax when you're thinking about whether the app is still running or not.
Notifications haven't worked for a long time. Not sold on Ebb talking AI either find it very annoying - impossible to resume an old meditation.
replyContent: Thank you for your feedback! We're sorry to hear you aren't enjoying the new changes in the app, and will make sure to let our team know. Our goal at Headspace has always been to reach as many people as we can with the tools to help live healthier and happier lives. If you have any suggestions, please send our team an email at help@Headspace.com.

content: Loved the app previously but now it keeps crashing mid meditation, forcing me to restart the meditation and not contributing to my streak. Like others have said, it's extremely slow, and when I tried doing one of the pre-set courses it would keep asking me to restart it. Won't renew my subscription. Whatever they've done to the app they've made it terrible.

I downloaded this specifically for the various meditation options. The content is great, but I can't ever seem to get through an entire session without the app stopping. As soon as my phone locks, the playback stops. When I unlock my phone, an error message says "Something went wrong" or "you're now offline" and the only way I clear the errors is to close and reopen the app. no matter what, playback stops. Very frustrating. I considered subscribing but will not if these issues persist.
Please avoid this company for your own mental health. I was tricked into a repeat subscription and the company dismissed me when I tried to contact them to resolve the issue.

This used to be so reliable for white noise overnight, but lately it crashes constantly. So frustrating, and now I'm being woken every morning early by the trains without the white noise to interfere, so I've got to give up and find a Spotify playlist or something else. Disappointing, I relied on this for ages. Update this is happening all over again after it briefly got better. I need to find a new app to help with sleep because this cuts off from errors every 5 minutes.
replyContent: Sorry about the trouble with the app, we suggest a quick reinstall to help with this. If that doesn't work, please send us a note to help@headspace.com so we can further assist.

content: So buggy!!! The sleepcasts are basically unusable at the moment because they stop working within 30 seconds of starting them. Also if I'm in a mediation and pause it or jump onto another app on my phone it will kick me out of the mediation and I'll have to restart. Please fix!!!

App is so glitchy. SO GLITCHY. and Visual layout is confusing, not at all intutiive, and everytying is hard to find. Worse of all - you can't make playlists of continuous meditations. Once 1 session is over, that's it. So you can't make sleep playlists that play all night like you can on calm.
Used to use this every day. Latest version errors out every time, not even worth opening the app. Tried re-installing. Disappointing.
Too expensive

Warning about Headspace customer service and refund experience I wanted to share a recent experience with Headspace in case it helps others manage expectations around their customer service and refund policies. Headspace’s content is good, but customer service was incredibly frustrating. I requested a refund and spent days in back‑and‑forth emails with different agents, none taking ownership or offering a clear solution. In the end, I had to escalate with my credit card company.
I never get to the end of a meditation or soundscape as the app just crashes. Not going to renew subscription

I was listening to one of the sessions yesterday and fell asleep half way through. Not only did I miss 10 whole minutes of the session, I woke up to a half used candle! D*mn your smooth voice Andy. Nevertheless, I give this app 5/5. (p.s. I was struggling to fall sleep this week so this is a positive review and... to anyone lighting candles during a session, do so with caution so as to avoid a fire)

This app aint it! Way too pricey for what you get. It's someone talking to you for a few mins. you can find meditation videos for that for free on youtube. When I didn't want the subscription anymore, they would not refund me the money. That's very bad business in my preference.
Can't beleive im paying so much for this only to have the sleepcasts crash after a few minutes about 99% of the time
keeps stopping

All the audio "experiences" are absolutely dominated by generic voiceover that constantly yaps at you. It's insanely loud compared to the backround and completely pulls me out of anything remotely resembling meditation or sleep. I paid money for this and can probably get a better product just asking ChatGPT for rain ambience. That is a genuinely special kind of terrible.
facing connectivity issues in the app.
it's not free at all, all the exercises require you to start a trail, so what's the point on downloading if you have to pay to use the app...

UPDATE: whatever new changes have been made to this app they are so frustrating. The app crashes constantly and I never had a problem before! on top of that the pages take forever to load. I'm reconsidering my purchase now. this used to be my favorite app and now it's completely unreliable. I didn't have this problem before - whatever updates they made have completely changed the app, And I'm frustrated that I'm paying for an app that doesn't work.
Keeps crashing since latest update December - issue is not fixed! It's worse! Please sort ASAP or I will not renew my subscription!
useful for people who can't work things out for themselves.
Just got an email thanking me for my payment. I cancelled the subscription midyear, but somehow I'm still being charged?? Not very relaxing losing money to app I don't use or want.
replyContent: Please reach out with your information to our support team at help@headspace.com. We look forward to assisting you!

content: Spent 10 minutes trying to find anything that was free, found a total of 3 things that were only 3-7 minutes long. Everything is behind a paywall. I remember downloading this app in 2019ish and it was much better when it came to free and pay ratio.

The app is broken now. The session stops and crashes multiple times within 15 minutes due to bogus network issues, even though I'm on Wi-Fi at home. It's definitely not a connection problem. 15 minutes must be cached on the device. Such instability is completely unacceptable for a meditation app. I've been using Headspace for close to 10 years now and have never had such problems before. I'm switching to Calm instead until this is resolved. This is frustrating.
impossible to cancel this ap

Update is horrendous. I've been using this for years (25,656 minutes used) and now it's unusable. Tracks stop after 30 seconds and it takes a day to load any pages. Devs really messed up a wonderful app. I'm really disappointed because I've used this for sleep, with my daughter and to teach mindfulness to students. And now it's just broken.
keeps telling me I have connection errors. unusable.
Needs a watch app, say play the sleep music and things like that.

I cancelled this before the end of the trial and was charged a full year anyway. I reached out to Headspace and they said it was a Google Play issue and Google Play said there is no proof the charge was "fraudulent", so apparently no one can help me get a refund for an app I couldn't afford

The Headspace content is great but the app has become increasingly frustrating. Initially it was just slow to react, if the kids wanted to change a sleep story for example. But more recently the app has just become unreliable, stopping playback after a few minutes. It's super annoying if you're trying to do a "Sleep SOS" but the app stops playing every 3 minutes and then instead of getting back to sleep I spend 15 minutes reinstalling the app and trying to get it working.
kept cutting out within 2 mins, even when downloaded.

Cuts off the meditation with seems you're offline and no one at Headspace cares. Also check the My Data section of the app because they default you to saying yes to selling your information. What a deplorable company.

ever since Ginger acquired Headspace, the direction the app has taken is less about meditation and more aboit mindfulness, therapy and workplace content. had a subscription since 2019 and this app was foundational to my practice but I didnt renew and have deleted the app on my phone.
doesn't sync to Google fit anymore since app was updated in September
useless app . not able to login and buy premium

I loved headspace for the longest time and it helped me a lot. However, if I want to be honest, I can no longer support the app. It had few issues in the past, but it still has major issues, like losing connection during long meditations, which is frustrating, such issues should not be my responsibility to solve. I think it is time for me to move on to other apps. The app no longer fulfills my needs.
ive been using this app for years at this point as of recently it keeps saying im offline even though I'm very much connected to the internet

I loved this app when I first used it 10 years ago - it was simple and felt authentic. I went to reinstall and was very disappointed that there is zero free content anymore and it looks as if the meditation has become gamified with 'streaks'. It's new duolingo but for meditation. How disappointing.

Been using this app for a few years now. The content is great but in recent weeks the app is constantly crashing, telling me I'm offline when I'm not. I contacted them to report it, but they've not been able to resolve the problem. From reading other reviews it seems to be a common issue with the latest version of the app. Very unsatisfactory
Good when it works ... BUT it Keeps Crashing 🫤 .. consistantly, over and over again
Is shutting down constantly the last month or so. Basically unusable now. Please fix.
My track plays four two minutes and then stops. Very annoying.
The app is good but the problem is that the care section of the app loads too slow or doesn't load. It needs a very strong wifi and doesn't load on mobile data. That needs to be improved.

I have had this app for literally years now. We used to love it. Now it won't load. Always says we are offline. If I can get it to load it works for 2 minutes then quite. My daughter uses it every night. Sounds like I need to move on and put my money into another app.

I have Samsung S25+ , and for more than a month the app stop again and again during the meditation and suggest to hear downloaded meditation. It doesn't happen with any other app only with headspace! No matter what I did, changed network, used only wifi, connection without wifi , cellular , nothing helps and Support telling me to upgrade to the latest version, which is exactly what I use. I really enjoyed this app until this issue began to happen. I am thinking of unsubscribe from headspace....

Sadly, the app currently doesn't work properly on Android, showing error messages of being allegedly offline (which isn't the case), hence stopping the audios. IT support acknowledged the problem but couldn't solve it.
don't even put the app free at this point everything, behind, paywall.

For an app that is quite expensive it is constantly glitching. I have used the app for quite some time. Recently every time I play a track it stops and says I have no internet connection which is incorrect. Can this issue please be sorted

The app could use A LOT of improvement. I sent the following suggestions through the only support form I could find, and got an utterly useless AI reply. Enough of this nonsense, DO BETTER. First, it would be very helpful to be able to do things with fewer taps: customize the homepage to quickly access certain libraries, eg. Sleepcasts; and more crucially have easier access the SOS resources. + bugs to fix: I constantly see a pop up saying I'm offline and the Explore button often doesn't work.
the app is crashing constantly today. not sure what the issue is, but it only lasts a minute or so each time.

usedto be a really good app, now buggy, slow, and crashes continously, use it for the sleep casts, takes forever to load and now fail within minutes telling me i am off line. considering cancelling subscription as the app has become useless
used to be great. no unusuable ... crashes 2 mins into every sleep cast. has been great but really regretting renewing in november. needs sorting or people will start asking for refunds

Changing my review from 5 stars in 2019 to 1. With every update, the app has gotten worse: harder to navigate, full of bugs, and now mostly unusable. It often won’t open, crashes constantly, Favourites and Recent are broken, excessively long loading screens after every click and recordings stop after a minute... Support gave a generic AI reply that didn’t help. Pushing of AI and therapy features is frustrating. I miss the simple app that actually worked. The price is not worth the struggle.
New bug crashes meditations when the screen goes to sleep
nice
Keeps crashing.

I have bought this app for years but recently I cant play any soundcast music without it giving me an error/ try again after about 1 min of playing.. what happened?? Hopefully they can fix because I really enjoy this app when it works... I will wait another month or two but if not updates, I will be canceling.

Uso la app para dormir, sin embargo, poco después de iniciar el sleepcast o cualquier otro material, se detiene de forma inesperada y solo aparece "oh dear, something is wrong", ocurre cada vez que inicio cualquier sleepcast, es muy molesto.

used for years but ever since the ai update the app takes ages to load to the point it's borderline unusable. not to mention that if i do accidentally click on the ai function it 1. doesnt load enough for me to use it anyway and 2. freezes the app to the point where i have to close and reboot it all over again in order to use it. the new ui hides my favorite courses from me in favor of pushing me towards the therapy/ai functions destroys the whole point of it being a mindful experience

Considering both that Andy would have learned mindfulness from actual, real life monks free of charge, and his claims that mindfulness helps the whole world, I consider the monthly fee to be rather steep. Aside from that, the content and app itself is useful and has helped me get started on a meditation practise.

your app make user difficult to remove payment method and subscription, your user experience is so bad, make user feel so worry and angry. I can't remove payment method, fortunely I don't have money on Visa account, if I have then I will lost money by Auto resubscription of your App
Another app that won't work if you don't create an account and provide personal details. Deleted.

Been a member for 3 years now. Was a great app in the beginning, but recent updates have almost rendered it useless. Super slow performance and sessions stop after playing for a few minutes. I keep thinking a new app update will come to resolve the issues, but its been months now with nothing. What does their IT team do??

They've locked most of all the once free meditations behind the premium, I no longer get premium anymore since it's too expensive and they've gotten rid of the lifetime membership too so they can keep sucking everyone's wallet through their aggressive subscription model.
