BUT it's alright cause I now use Meditopia which I've been able to purchase a lifetime subscription for! It's also better than headspace as their meditations have more depth to them imo, I'm a happy Meditopia customer now :)
I'm still on a trial using period and it's bugging a lot. I don't think I'll take subscription

Not worth it. The entire app is now a pay to play. You cannot listen along without paying for any videos. I used to use this app singularly for the Ebb reflection feature, but they have since gotten rid of it.
I love the content, but the app is glitchy and unstable. It's really disruptive to a sleep wind-down or meditation experience when the app quits in the middle of it!

usually amazing but In the last few weeks the bug when opening the app is soooo frustrating. back at it again with new bug. during a track it will randomly say 'your offline' and I'm definitely not. the track will stop completely and have to be backed out of reopened with hopes it won't happen again. it also says with this pop up, to listen to things I've downloaded. well when Ive tried to download things in the past and recently, the option to download isn't there. please help!
I just cancelled my subscription I had for 7-8 years. The app has been getting consistently worse over time. no more.

used to be a great app, used it for a few years . but recently its become almost impossible to use . unable to even open it most nights and when I can open it ,after about 2 minutes into a sleep story it stops and shows an error. I pay for this,it isn't free so should work everytime
app has been very slow and crashing a lot for me over the past few months. almost unusable.

This app has become absolute trash. Takes forever to load anything, white noise tracks abruptly end after a minute of play, some features don't even work. The developers have had multiple bad reviews, yet make NO improvements. Don't waste your money on a Headspace subscription, this thing is garbage. It produces more anxiety and frustration than it should, which is ironic for an appointment designed to increase relaxation.

Glitchy and unreliable. I love the app when it works, but there's always an issue. Current issue is the sleepcast stops running and says I'm offline when I have full wi-fi. Last months issue was buffering and taking ages to open. I have excellent superfast broadband so I don't understand.
this app has been incredibly glitchy for the past 6 months or so..! for an expensive paid for app, this really is unacceptable.!

Pretty wild that an app about meditation, connecting to yourself and reality, and improving mental health includes an AI chat bot at all, and there's no way to hide or disable it. Another example of hopping on a dangerous trend without considering the implications and negative impact it may have on users who rely on it. Bad form, shame on you.

Unfortunately, like most other folks on here I am disappointed with the 'upgrade' to the app. Used this app as a paid subscriber since 2014 and I will not renew. My meditation time across more than ten years is more than 75,000 minutes. I haven't used it in about a month. The support I have always received over the years has been excellent. The app is buggy, clunky, takes up huge space &c.. The app now embodies the Australian word of the year 2024. Did I say disappointed already?

Since the last UI update the app has been extremely slow to load. Keeps loading and telling me I have no Internet connection, which is definitely not true. meditations regularly stop while my phone screen is off. If this keeps up I'm cancelling my subscription.
app keeps stopping while doing sleepcasts. Useless
You Literally need to do a free trial which I don't wanna do cuz I'm gonna forget, But you literally need to just to view the basics.

Was great been using more frequently the past year, but now it says I'm offline, due to my Internet connection, only problem is that my Internet connection is fine with everything else on my other apps and using the web. This app is the only app that I'm having problems with and I paid for it.
Used to be a great app now it crashes all the time. Meditations turn off and it runs extremely slowly. Will probably cancel my subscription.

I love the content and it has completely changed how I sleep. My only gripe is that it is quite glitchy. I often have to shutdown and reopen the app to get it to function. I wish they would fix this as a crash in the middle of a meditation totally kills the vibe
Cute

horrible. I used to love this app, but I have not been able to use this app for a couple of weeks now because it keeps crashing. I have tried every troubleshoot option the AI chat gave me. support finally emailed me but no replies go through to them email, so I cant access something I paid for and also cant receive support. actively making my mental health worse at this stage.

seems to have stopped working for so many things now - meditations etc will just stop with an error message halfway. feels like there is a big issue with the last update which needs to be fixed? it is really disapointing when you've invested in an annual subscription.

the idea and available meditations and sleep casts are great. But the app is very slow and crashes regularly. It happened several times that the audio stopped a few seconds in and a restart didn't solve the issue. So I can't use the app reliably, even though I pay for the subscription

Great when it works. Every night I have to reboot my phone to open the app, otherwise it just hangs, then crashes a minute after opening. Update: sleepcasts are stopping early now, too. I'm about ready to cancel my subscription. The previous issue still isn't fixed.
I love Headspace!! There are so many ways to help me with being my best me and sleeping better along with so much more!!

I used to recommend this to everyone. Now, it seems so buggy that it is an actively bad experience. Meditations consistently fail to load. Some seem to, and then freeze at odd places, making it impossible to trust the built-in silences in those that do load - is this an expected pause or has something gone wrong? You'd think that the download option would help, but they disappear or claim to be "buffering". Really frustrating to take time out to be mindful only to end up fighting with an app.

App hasn't worked properly since the update. Displays the wrong pages until I click in and out of the reflection section and this week keeps stopping one minute into the sleep casts, not very relaxing at all!

retaliate? after writing the review below the app took 5 to 10 seconds to load any page? UNINSTALLED!!!!! _________David is awesome Aluna voice is one of the most agitating things I've ever heard when trying to be calm. I struggle with Focus issues and really wish David was available and canceled for this reason.

The volume of fluff in this app can make it difficult to navigate around sometimes - it's a bit chaotic. But more importantly (and irritatingly), the app stalls repeatedly, making it time consuming to get to what I want (often requires several retires). Decent content, but I'd look at other apps if I were you.

Good but annoying bugs. I have come back to Headspace as I find the app easier and less overwhelming to use that some others. It does seem to have developed some issues with loading time and also crashing halfway through meditations.

I've used headspace for 5 years. I listen to it at bedtime and so does my son. But it has been so glitchy for the past few months, I'm done. Taking forever to load or just not loading at all. Now it stops playing after 2 minutes unless I'm playing a downloaded sleepcast, but it won't play from the download and I can't find wherever they hide the downloads. Its becoming complete trash. I'm switching to Calm.
its been a bit unstable recently. if your internet disconnects during a meditation it just drops, not great if you're trying to breathe through some anxiety
just tried to meditate and the app keeps on stopping mid sentence. really disapointed.

Useless app. Used to be a great simple app with good meditations. But it's become a bloated and buggy mess that takes too long to load and is hard to find and meditations you want, if it even works. I now can't get through a meditation due to app errors.

No longer usable. I used to use the app several times a week, but recently there are so many bugs that it is impossible to use. App loads slowly, pages are not possible to navigate between (tap on another page and the same page just reloads), and when you finally get into a meditation it will stop after a couple of minutes with an error message.

New update is bad, it always worked until this last update, since then one cannot meditate peacefully because it stops working in the middle of the meditation, this now stresses the user which is quite the opposite of what meditation should do ...

the app seems to crash all the time, especially if I try to play something but minimize the app. I want to use the app for the bedtime stories but it will crash if I turn off my screen. I also wished that I could put a sleep timer on the stories because they're normally 45 minutes long, and I just don't need that much. it will actually wake me up at some point

Constant connection issues. It is slow to load and often says I'm offline even if I am connected to wifi or am in data range. Occurs mostly with the get care option which is very frustrating because then I miss my appointment time.

The app frequently hangs and freezes. It's almost I possible to finish an entire session (some are only 20 minutes) without it crashing more than 5 times. It's highly frustrating and impossible to use. I've tried various ways to solve this issue (reinstall, restart my phone, check internet, check stor) and none of them work. Have requested a refund and hope it goes through.
I have come back to this app after a while not using it and am disappointed. iIt crashed three times mid meditation which rather defeats the point.
lots of bugs lately

When it works it's great. Continually have to reinstall it because it just randomly crashes with an "oh dear, something went wrong" message. App had been screwing up for months yet Hs never updates it.

I have been using Headspace for years, however, recent updates have really degraded the experience. The app often freezes upon opening, and when it does actually open, it frequently takes over 10 seconds to load content. Sleepcasts and soundscapes error out and stop several minutes into listening. Customer service has been understanding and responsive, but unfortunately the app is not helpful in its current state.

Constantly crashes. I use the soundscapes every night for sleep, but now it crashes after a minute or less. It is also slow to load. It's a shame because I really enjoy using it but, currently, it is unusable.
needs update immediately, the app keeps crashing won't load and freezes, making it unusable and adding to the problem not fixing it
Persistent bugs that have not been fixed and causes your phone to crash. Disappointing for a paid app. Now, the app constantly says that you're offline and takes forever to load.
truly fabulous, when I experienced a loss I subscribed and did the Grief pack. It helped me monumentally. I still use it everyday to this day, worth every penny!

Love the sleep casts and the Ebb chat. However it repeatedly stops playing the sleepcasts saying "oh dear, something's wrong. Random nights. My wifi connection is fine. I close the app and reopen with the same issue a few times and give up. Then next night, no problem, then two nights later happens again. So insanely frustrating.

The latest update has caused the app to take minutes to launch/load. I'm tired of closing pop-ups for therapy; I didn't subscribe to HS for therapy and wish they could be opted out of. Since adding therapy services, the app performance has suffered. With the latest update, the soundscapes play for less than a minute before stopping now. Soundscapes have always been a bit buggy but the app is practically unusable for me now.

I only use Headspace for sleepcasts, as it's helped get me to sleep with having tinnitus for years. However, the app is so unreliable and I've not been able to use it for a week due to a bug that they are aware of. Sleepcasts aren't available on the website, which is really frustrating, because I'm paying for an app that I can't use.
The loading speed is slow and stressful. Super buggy. Cancelled the subscription because this app made me more stressful.
can't log in. keeps telling me I already have an account and to log in . which I proceed to do and it repeats itself. I'm locked out in a loop it feels like .
I loved the content but they charge you yearly without any notification. When you ask for a refund they dismiss you. Fake calmness and support, wrapped in consumerism.
I can't access any options without paying or doing a trail or something. I don't spend money on apps so this is not for me.

Used to be great but started to get very laggy which was mildly annoying but like others are now reporting it now disconnects and stops after a minute or so. For a relaxation app all of this is unacceptable so will not be renewing my subscription.
Great meditation app! The one thing I wish for is that you could start listening to a meditation/soundscape track before it has finished downloading.

loads extremely slowly now, and I don't want Ebb! sitting here waiting over a minute just to tap the next menu in the three I need to open a sleep cast. Meanwhile Ebb has a dedicated button and loads lightning fast, and I'll never use it!!!

Scam Alert. If you subscribe for a free trial through Google Play, Headspace will charge you for a full year, even if you unsubscribe before the free trial is complete. They will then say it's Google Plays problem and not help you. Be warned, their free trial will cost you $69.99 whether you like it or not. Review edited to 2 stars: as after 6 times telling me a refund was impossible, I canceled my bank card and put in a fraud claim. Finally Headspace relented and agreed to a refund.
lots of technical issues with video and the audio meditations cutting off so I had to unfortunately cancel it.
Too buggy now. I get "oops" pop ups from Headspace multiple times a day. Been a daily user since 2020 and this is a new issue.
App does not work well on android. Keeps giving error messages that it is offline. During a meditation, the app hangs and the meditation stops. I would expect more from an app I am paying for.

I've been a subscriber for 5+ years & for most of those years, the app was great. With the introduction of therapy & AI add-ons, the app gets incrementally worse. Now, the sessions just stop after a few mins with a connection error (which I know isn't on my end). I've been enduring the changes, hoping that each blip will be corrected for a better product in the long-term. It seems, however, it may be time to cancel my sub & seek a better service. It appears from other reviews, I'm not alone...

Dec 5th 2025 update has messed up the app even worse. If you're in a sleep cast, it will stop and tell you you're offline even if you're connected to wifi or good mobile connection. No way to download sleep casts either for when this happens 3 or 4 times per night.

App didn't recognize my google play subscription, even though I tried activating it several times. the app takes several minutes to load. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling twice. update: Headspace says Google play isn't activating the acct, gave "free" (I already paid) year. still having issues loading, so still 4 stars.

The app is unusable. Help line is chat AI that is even more frustrating. AI Keeps asking same questions. The content is good but using the app is terrible . Then you can't cancel the subscription. Terrible.

Poor technical performance. In the middle of streaming a meditation, it will cut out. But if it happens during a quiet part, you will never know, so you'll just sit there unaware that it froze up. Streaming audio is not that hard, come on, it's 2025.
replyContent: Thank you for reaching out. We are sorry for the trouble with the glitches you experienced. Please send us a note to help@headspace.com and we'd be happy to assist further

content: Was my go to app for sleep music and sleep casts. But not sure what has gone wrong the last 2 months. App is horrible now, slow and very buggy. Like other users, it cuts out now. It pisses me off and the opposite of relaxation. App makers, do not reply and tell me to email help@ like you have others. You know and knew you had major issues, and have not resolved it. Will not renew my subscription. Its a shame.

I used to love this app for meditation. it was my go to and I used it everyday. I even used it with my students at school who enjoyed and benefited from group meditation. But sadly in recent times the app has gone severely down hill. It is all but unusable now: glitchy ui, pages don't load, things are very slow when they do load. As well it is very difficult to find anything. It's the end of an era for me, and I will be unsubscribing.

While this app is offered free through my healthcare plan, it appears to be worth what I'm paying for it. I need background/white noise to sleep. There are a decent number of choices, but they all fail within 30-90 minutes with a notice that I'm "offline" & disrupting my sleep.

The app quality is going down. Long loading times, meditations being interrupted by "going offline " when connected, which means you must leave the app and reload really takes time out of mindfulness. Please re-evaluate the app entirely
I would have given it 5 stars before it was paywalled but unfortunately, nothing is free except the trial.
exceptional and worth every penny!
I usually love Headspace, but the latest update has absolutely broken the sleepcasts, which is infuriating for obvious reasons. Please fix!!
Thank you so much. I have been using this app for over 5 years now best in everything
replyContent: We deeply apologize for the inconvenience and want to help investigate the issue. Please reach out with your information to our support team at help@headspace.com. We look forward to hearing from you!

content: previously the interface was very easy to use..now after the latest update the app became clumsy and the interface is like some shopping app..it is not relaxing to use the app rather it is so distracting..so reducing the rating from 5 to 2.

This app used to really good but over the last year has gradually got worse. It's very slow to open, crashes frequently and at the end of a meditation session get black screen and run streak not updated. At the end of my subscription I will certainly consider moving to another app

Headspace starts well — beginner meditations are simple, clean, and actually teach you breathing and focus. But after that, it’s a paywall hell. Everything worthwhile is locked, making it a glorified wallet vacuum selling “peace of mind” like NFTs. The free part? A sad demo that wouldn’t calm a goldfish. If you don’t fix this, you’ll lose every beginner, and your app will be remembered as the joke that sold Zen like a scammy candy bar. 🔥😡💀, if you removed paywall, just reply to this.

This app has great content, I've used it for a long time but it seems to be operating slower than it used to and not loading various sleepcasts and meditations very well to point where I give up on using it. This is not a cheap app so I would expect better.
I used to use this daily but now the app crashes all the time. I can't load any meditations not very calming!
i love old daily list
Excellent. We'll worth having
Massive improvement to my well-being, I could not recommend it more. Great job Headspace team!

I've had only good things to say about this app until now... Every feature is now delayed to load. 5/10 sec might not seam like a lot, but when that happens for every program to load just to meditate really takes you out of it. please put it back the way it was. or I will not renew again. because now I'm paying for something I dont even want to use.
So good for your health and mind. I freaking love that this was invented. Beautiful!! Checkout DuckAndPheonix Podcast on Instagram. It doesn't pay so you know it's got to be good. ^_-.

so far the app seems really good, and I like that the meditations are so accessible (I mean short and on your own time, maybe not quite so easy to find in the app judging by other people's reviews) however I have only given it 3 stars because of the inclusion of AI which has no place in a mental health app, whatever safeguards have been put on place (having to put disclaimers on the Ebb front page should be a warning sign!)
Buggy. Crashes mid-meditation. No Google integration.

So disappointed you guys chose to take the AI route with Ebb... I'm leaving! Not only is AI a massive environmental issue, it has caused mental distress and deaths among children and fragile people. This is incredibly insensitive coming from an app like this.

Glitchy and the opposite of calm when faced with the wheel of doom trying to load a sleepcast in the middle of the night... When I open the app it takes ages to load and won't move into the "explore" tab. I've been forced to listen to the programmes I've heard before, as they're on the home screen. Please fix as I love the content, I just need to be able to get to it!

I've liked this app for a long time but over the years it has become impossible to find anything. Now it seems like you either have to use a search bar or interact with their AI companion which is miserable. Unsubscribing and bailing. there are a bunch of cheaper apps that do what I want better.
Horrible interface.. stood out immediately. Shockingly bad.

this is probably a great app, too bad the entire thing is locked behind a paywall I'm not paying for something I can find on YouTube for free. Fair enough if some or even most things come with a subscription but you need to pay just to use the app
"in app purchases" everything requires payment, you may as well pay up front instead of being misleading
App is good, but please implement adaptive icons!

Such a shame this app was so good in the past, now unusable since update. Customer service has become so poor have been waiting 4 days for a reply still no response. Have been left with no choice but to now cancel subscription.
bought linkedin premium and got 4 months of headspace subscription free. unable to use it on the app. after logging in, keeps asking me start free trial.
Great content, but sync to Google fit does not work. Also the older version of the app where it worked is not allowed to run
Latest update has left the app interface looking cluttered and not easy on the eye. Don't know how it passed user testing.

I love the app. It's helped me through difficult times and I use it to meditate or go to sleep almost every day. But for the past year or so it's become very slow to load and bugs have appeared. I'm having to load the app twice to get to the Explore page and with the slow loading screens that often takes over a minute. It's a shame that such a great service is tainted by such disappointing software issues. If this were a free app, I wouldn't mind so much but for a paid service, I expect better.

I love the headspace, but why did they get rid of like the morning, afternoon, then night page for meditations? That was my favorite part of head's pace because it gave me structure for the day. Please bring back a similar feature.

Very hard to find any genuine meditations. Poor layout and categorisations despite the good looking UI. Now vibrations have been added when pressing buttons in the app and no way to turn it off! This makes the app unusable for me.

Deeply Disappointing and Ethically Questionable Charged for a yearly subscription without ever getting the free trial. No one at Headspace is taking accountability for what seems like a payment glitch. Extremely stressful and ironic coming from a mental-health app. Highly unethical, zero transparency, and happening right before the holidays. Cannot recommend.
super buggy. implemented its own AI chat bot 🤢
I'm tired of AI features. it's not going to help me meditate better, it's just another distraction.

Edit: Despite having a paid plan to Headspace, I have uninstalled the app. In the past year, it has caused me more frustration than peace. It is slow to start up. Often the meditations don't load at all, and it's more difficult to find the meditations I've downloaded. Previously: 5 stars. Lovely meditation app. I have had a subscription to headspace the past few years, and the experience just keeps getting better. I love all the different courses, and it's a great reminder to pause and focus.

had to edit my review due to the latest updates making it frequently crash (mid meditation even) and become incredibly slow. Hope this is fixed ASAP simply the best part of my morning routine to set up for a great and mindful day.
I mean historically this app is incredible, but a recent update or something has rendered it unusable. it crashes after the first minute of a sleep cast every single night.
Worked great until most recent update. now it crashes 3 minutes into everything. not renewing my annual subscription if this isn't fixed soon
Prices are high.

Don't do it- they suck you in with a cheap offer, then get sneaky with billing and cancelations in addition to not having a transparent cancelation clause. Unless you plan to use it every day, it's not worth the hassle and headache. Not great overall, aside from the sleep stories there are much more affordable and comprehensive apps available.
Good content, but why change [crapify] the layout? It *was* linear and clear, progressing throughout the day in quick and easy view. Not anymore. Ugh, and why shove AI to the front?? DO NOT WANT.

Headspace has been a game changer for my mindfulness and meditation. I never really took it seriously before but after actually trying, I can see the benefits it has. A bonus is that the subscription is covered by my insurance (and from what I've heard a lot of other insurance plans).

The product itself has been fine, but I'm really disappointed that there was no heads-up before the annual renewal. A quick reminder so customers can review their usage and decide whether they want to continue would make sense. an email would have made all the difference. Hoping the company reconsiders this process going forward.

Ditto all of the recent negative reviews. The app is extremely buggy and slow. Infuriating to use. I have the service as part of my employer benefits, but it's not a useful benefit if the app is unresponsive.
Very chaotic design. Very difficult to navigate what the app offers, very difficult to find and continue the programs you started. That's everything a meditation app should not be.
I think Headspace came into my life at the right time.
The content is great, but the app is horrible: very slow, I need to restart it many times during the use to make it work, very annoying! It worked well a year ago, but not anymore

the UI changes that keep being implemented are horrible, have no sense, and change what was an intuitive and well running interface into something clunky and not user-friendly. I'm not sure whether they did any user testing before coming up with these changes, but they really don't seem to be based on anything. bring back the old, tried, and true UI. just read the number of complaints about the latest update, note to you product owner just revert the PR. no one likes these new updates.
Have paid for a year's subscription, and yet all the content is locked. Customer Service is nonexistent, they have taken my money though that bit was very efficient
Compared to waking up! 3.5 stars is fair also app lags alot
Start your free trial. You're no eligible for the trial.
useless customer service
I've used it for years but it has been giving bad login errors for the pass 3 weeks. Reset password doesn't work. I don't know what i am paying for the frustration just increases my stress
Latest version is difficult to navigate for courses without getting duplicate content or seeing the same content again and again. would be much better if recommendations had clear pathways
paid full yearly price, 12 hours later received a discount code from them. emailed a request to apply the discount code, they refused. really poor customer experience.

Sad it's changed. I've paid for a subscription to Headspace for years, but unfortunately won't be renewing due to the app now becoming slow, unresponsive and not worth the hassle. I gave ample time to see it it was going to get any better before reviewing and cancelling and it has not. When you pay for a service you expect it to work properly and unfortunately this one just doesn't work smoothly anymore

I haven't got the app for long now and I really like to use it. The thing that annoys me is the "Explore tab". Most of the times I open the app and want to go into the library aka the "Explore tab" and the app sabotages itself and nothing happens. I have to close and restart the app MULTIPLE TIMES before it works.

Unfortunately, this app just gets worse. Besides the unnecessary amount of features and videos that are hyper stimulating and distracting from the meditation, it's now full of bugs. The audios from some sessions suddenly stop working or don't even start at all. I wish there was an option to hide anything but the meditation assets, I used to love this app when this was its main focus.

Recently renewed my sub and regret it immensely. I dislike being hounded into signing up with their therapists. I can't even get to my settings without being forced to go to the "sign up with a therapist page" the fact that an icon for that also takes up valuable task bar space is annoying. You are taking my money in order to push your therapist service. Really truly bad taste, Headspace. you aren't what you used to be. I want my money back.
endless buffering. its irking when you're trying to relax for a minute and spend 20 minutes trying to get the app to work. i press play on the cbt course, i just get buffering and nothing loads.
All the videos and expert guidance can't be opened - getting the message that something is wrong and need to try again later. So can't access the majority of content - waste of time and money.

I like headspace but i hate the app. So much stuf, i have no idea how to find anything i need and see no structure in hundreds of courses and singles. Really frustrates me every time i am trying to find something beside basics.
You broke your app for android users with the latest update!!!!! I literally only use this app for sleepcasts and now you cannot get to them the explore buttons are completely non functional. Fix it!
This app is not what it once was - so painfully slow to load and awful navigation

Enshittification at its best. I have been a long time headspace user and hate to see how this app is devolving. Why at any point would you say "Hey I know, let's make everything more difficult for our customers to navigate?" "How about we remove all descriptions and narrator names?" "Favorites?? No, our customers don't deserve to have favorites." WHYYY???
used daily for years, helped me transform

app is extremely buggy, scheduling sessions never receive confirmation or meeting info. never able to get help from their support, all they do is to forward your issue to the tech support team offline. and nothing comes off it. Feels like they're taking easy employer money, but never provide the proper service
cancelled my subscription 4 months ago, charged me regardless for another year. they wouldn't issue a refund even though I've notified them of the issue within 24h a shame for an app about wellbeing
Helps me to focus 😌
app is really poor. takes ages to load and sleepcasts are buggy. gone downhill

LinkedIn Premium is promoting 4 months of free Headspace, but the reality is completely different. After logging in, there is no option to claim the free subscription. Instead, the app asks you to pay for the remaining 8 months upfront before you can access anything. This is misleading and feels like a trap, not a genuine free offer. Customers expect transparency, not hidden conditions. I’m sharing this so others don’t get fooled by this “4-month free” claim.

Update 25/11/25: Investigated and found I was meant to have access for as long as my employment! Verifying teaching status is failing now 🙄😔. I do love the app, when I could access it for free as an educator! Without warning, one night when I was going to bed, the app had stopped my access. I assumed they only gave me 12 months of access, but no information about the subscription ending. I felt disappointed by this as I used it one night to go to sleep and the next night everything was locked.
The latest update ruined the app and google fit sync is also broken. Thanks I guess....

Since the update the app feels very cluttered and it's harder to find everything. sometimes it feels quite overwhelming when I just want to find a sleepscape or mediation. Also, this app no longer connects to Google Fit, I've tried everything suggested on the support section of the app and still nothing. I have it connected so I can earn Vitality points, so this is inconvenient as I'm missing out on these points.

Kept getting log out. Even though it's linked to Google account, doesn't let me log in (kept popping that there is an issue but no other solutions). Used email to log in then it's said the email already linked to an account. Endless repeated install and uninstall. Somebody fix the issue please cuz I still have 12 month subscription.

Went in thinking it'd be useful but EVERYTHING costs money. Funny that its an app to help reduce stress when spending money is a HUGE stress factor. Thanks for giving me false hope and false advertising. What's t he point of helping people when you only want to profit off of them? Wish this company had better morals than profiting from mental ill people looking for a place to meditate.
I did like the app, but they did a sneaky renewal set up on their own and now won't issue a refund.
good
Tried to enable the 14 day free trial but it took annual payment instead of enabling free trial with credit card details. Misleading and dark pattern practices.
Does not always load or is very slow, crashes mid meditation. Why don't they just fix it?
Very slow recently

New update has significantly degraded the usability of the app. The Today tab is way too cluttered and needs to be streamlined, load times for meditations are way longer and has frequently required restarting the app due to the app crashing or endless buffering, and the activity history is not saving to my profile. I am missing half of the meditations in my activity I've done over the past month. Significant downgrade in quality overall.
not free
Unable to log in. I have tried all ways and it constantly says I have an account already and can't log in. I've never used the app before

latest update has made the app really laggy. 1st October edit and it's still awful, none of the updates speed up the awful lagginess since you added the AI thing 😭 November edit - fed up of the app performance so I've cancelled, can highly recommend Plum Village instead!

not what it used to be. the user interface is the opposite of relaxing. it seems like such a messy app, different things everywhere. difficult to find and explore despite there being an explore tab. how about a simple search bar? and it seems all of Andy's stuff is just cut up and recycled old stuff... you can tell because the sound of his voice literally changes between the intros and the guidance. after years and years I've decided to go with a different app.
This app is painfully slow to load, difficult to navigate and was a nightnare to sign up to. I get it free with my insurance. I can't believe people actually pay for it
it's not a free app it's just a free trial very misleading

I previously gave this app a 5 star review, as I have been using it for years. Ever since the update it's EXTREMELY slow, to the point where I rarely use it because I get frustrated it takes so long for anything to load. I will likely cancel my subscription and try another app. I'm sad about this, I miss old Headspace bring it back
since major update, app barely loads and when does, it randomly shuts off or locks up.
this app sucks. like I mean it sucks so hard that even though I got it for free I still went back and paid for their competitors app again. get better coaches, better scripts and less grating voices.

good thing I got this app for free as part of a promotion. Been on it 4 days. Started a course and it limits how much you can do each day, ok no issues. thing is you come back the next day and CAN'T FIND where you left off. so annoying! did none of you try to use this app? and to think it's supposed to relax you! 2months on: I'm getting notifications daily when I click on them for meditation it puts me on the home screen of the app not what the notification pointed at. what a mess this app is!
Used to be great, since the September 2025 update it has become unusable. Google Fit integration no longer works, so useless if using in conjunction with Vitality.

Update: 2025- Look. I love Headspace and I use it every day. I've been using it for years. But this is the buggiest app on my phone, and I have to restart it multiple times each time just to get to the library. I spend more time staring at the loading page than I do meditating. It crashes and deletes my streak all the time, even though I never miss a day. I will keep my subscription and keep using it, but the Headspace team has some serious repairs to do.
this update prevents me from closing the app with the Back Button, leaving me in a loop between Explore and Home
everything is pay locked. the only thing you get is a notification to breath everyday.

this app went from the best to the worst I a few months. I honestly think they hired developers that think Javascript is really programming as their app developers. I do still really like the service. I just wish they had actually good developers.

Update: Going from a 5 to a 2. I used this for years and loved it. Recently got it again and I'm so disappointed. The app is awful now. It's unbelievably slow (like literally having to wait for tabs to load every time I open) and the UI isn't as good as it used to be. My phone is fine and nothing else operates this way, please fix the app 😢 The continued updates and new content are great to see but I need a smooth functional app.

I really liked the app but the last few months is bugging constantly. Some videos cannot start and if I miss one day I'm losing the videos of the day. The whole structure in the app changes. I have to reinstall the app to return everything to normal. Even clearing the caches did not help. This frustrated me so much so I decided to not pay for the next year. I'm so sad and disappointed. If this is not fix there is no point to continue paying no matter in the past was beneficial for me.

Used to be a nice app. Now it's mostly frustrating to use (very slow, lots of loading screens, too many buttons, options and choices in your face), which seems a bit counter productive with this being a meditation tool promoting relaxation. No real help from support ("Have you tried restarting your device?" "Thank you for your feedback, we'll look into it"). I do regret buying a whole year subscription - will not renew.

used to be a 5 star review. came back to the app after a couple years and now the habit builder is gone. that was the most important feature of the app. can't justify paying money for meditations and workouts when there's an abundance of free videos on the Internet
working very slow. also error is coming every now and then
what the app does is great, but they still haven't fixed the connection with Google fit
used to be helpful. now you can't do anything without a membership. loaded up the app and was so frustrated I couldnt find anything doable.

app won't load anymore, despite weekly updates. idk what they are fixing with the updates, but they haven't fixed the most important problem. I've tried reinstalling, clearing the cache, restarting my phone, etc. problem persist for months now. app support doesn't seem to even acknowledge the issue, even though multiple users have the same problem.

Active subscription. Home screen stays blank grey. Also, unable to play any of the meditation & other courses. The app has become very buggy. Very disappointing. EDIT : These bugs are removed in the version 4.281.5 & now the app's working fine
lags a lot and buggy!
Excessively long load times... if it loads at all! 😑
Useless unless you pay...
sleepscspes are particularly good

app only loads half the time, and when it does it's extremely slow. cannot navigate back and forth between different pages/sections of the app without it freezing. used to love the content but now feel like the subscription was a waste of money
App stopped working in mid-October. Wrote multiple emails to customer support - they're slow to respond, and following their instructions hasn't worked at all. Huge waste of time.
terrible. Most of the meditations are locked with the free plan do not recommend
not very easy to navigate. very cluttered.

i got stressed trying to get the subscription, the normal subscription didnt process button didnt took action, tried with 3 email id, asked a friend, applied coupon, tried web app, tried 2 browsers, raised a ticket, nothing worked.
money stresses me out, hypocritical.
is there glich in the app, I reinstalled but app home page is not working

Great content but the app has become slow and buggy. It crashes when opening it, it takes forever to load various screens, etc. Not at all a relaxing experience, I wouldn't recommend it unless they fix their app

Good content, but crashes frequently now. I mostly use the sleep content especially sleep stories for getting my son to sleep. The app freezes in under 30 minutes more than half of the time now. It's very frustrating because this never used to be an issue.

very disappointed in this app. It used to be a reliable, simple app that was there to help you and nothing else. Now everything is hidden behind a paywall. Its not even worth paying for. Just Ai generated slop.
I'm taking a star away every week this app fails to load. I love headspace, but the app is repeatedly crashing now. please fix this bug!

I used to love this app but for the past month it has not been working at all for me. we have had a subscription for the past 4 years and are now looking somewhere else. please fix soon before we find something else. My husband's app got updated (pixel) but mine has not updated (Samsung) and so I am still not able to use the app.

Recent updates mean the app won't even load at least once a week. And personally I don't want AI features or the added therapist finder. This used to be a great tool for regular, meaningful meditations updated regularly. But now it feels like all the other corporate drivel focused on a quick buck using AI. I used to happily pay for the subscription and now have sadly decided to cancel at my next renewal. Be better Headspace!
love the app. if only it could load faster. I even have the pixel 10 which is very snappy.

2025:a new version of the app and it again feels like unfinished beta. lot of new content, but everything feels unpolished :( 20s freeze on app start like if it was 2008. crashes during meditation. no way to restart a meditation pack from the middle. super long loading times with no network activity. there's a lot of potential here, but maybe some funds should go to Android devs and testing. USA is not the whole world, a lot of ppl out there using Android, even if you are all sitting on iPhones.
replyContent: We are really sorry for the trouble and we appreciate you bringing this issue to our attention. We will look into this further!

content: Annoying app performance
most of the time I face grey screen in headspace application home page kindly fix this issue

Headspace has felt quite stale for a long time, they have not inovated with new features that benefit the experience for nearly a decade. The recordings themselves are great, but are usually too short for my taste. I primarily use Headspace for sleep with Andy Puddicombe's soothing voice, but these sleep wind downs are also short. For sleep, I wish they inovated with dynamic winddowns that can have a winddown of any length, and a total length with gentle reminders and such. Inovatate plz
Can't play half the Meditations, often even the daily one. Really not cool if I carve out the time for myself and then the app doesn't work. if it was free, OK, whatever, but it's not :(

It is a good investment my my mental wellbeing. I love playing a play list while it stimulate me to do my hourse work. I focus on the fucus and when the music finish (usually it last one hour) I can decide to continue my house work or feel content with what I had accomplish during listening to soothing music. I defenitely feel relax and not stress after my session.
This app malfunctions constantly
it takes a lot of time to open, every 3-4 days something happens and i can't get into the meditations library, instead i'm stuck on the first screen

The lag after the big update is insane! I use and rely on this app daily and now it's a major source of frustration. I'm about to have to renew and may use something else. I'm sad about that because the content here is great IF you can get it to load!

cant log in. middle of the night, can't sleep and getting so frustrated. Just keeps saying you have a social media login but none of them work and neither does email? no one to help. feel really upset

overall I really like it but the latest updates have been terrible - very buggy, crashing, taking forever to load. if that can get fixed will definitely give it 5 stars because otherwise the content is excellent.

Zero stars if poss. 2025: new version is WORSE THAN AWFUL Takes forever to load, blank screen spinning wheel, but worse the daily meditation reverts to starting as THREE MINUTES every day. And today stopped offering 5 mins. That is ridiculous! Landing page overcrowded and unusable. You folks should see the comments on Reddit! And yes I already wrote to help and the reply was useless. Will not renew if not fixed. I gave it 5* once, slowly down now to 1*, as low as possible.
replyContent: Thank you for reaching out. We are sorry for the trouble. Please send us a note to help@headspace.com and we'd be happy to assist further.

content: I love the headspace service but this app is constantly crashing and my phone wants to put it in deep sleep mode to prevent performance issues. I use this app regularly to help me get through my day to day as a cancer patient, and it helps me to get to sleep, when it crashes and doesnt work it is extremely disruptive and the problem is getting worse. Taking care of a broken app is anything but meditative.

this is frustrating, I received an offer for 50% off for the year, I downloaded app and it's requested the full amount. I've sat for ages on chatbot as can't find an email address, as stress and anxiety go, you've added to mine

I like the content of this app on the few occasions I can get it to work, but the app itself is almost completely nonfunctional at this point. Will load occasionally, but most of the time just gets stuck loading or crashes randomly when browsing through the app

Complete rubbish, won't sync with Google fit, uninstalled, reinstalled, etc etc. headspace, have told me, they know there's an issue but no idea when it will be fixed, saving grace is that it was free from Vitality.

This app is no longer usable. It freezes even after I clear the cache and force restart. It crashes after 2-5 minutes of a sleep podcast. And, they doubled the subscription price but I didn't see the annual charge until after "the cancellation period ended" and they refused a refund. So I'm stuck with this app that I AM PAYING FOR that DOESN'T EVEN WORK. It's supposed to be for my mental health but it's causing me more stress right now than it's relieving it.

I used to really enjoy the Headspace app and recommend it, but I find it virtually unusable these days. Since "ebb" the integrated AI has come in I've found it very slow with loading times, and I find it much more difficult to navigate. I do however recommend a meditation practice, and whilst Headspace does have some good basics courses, I think learning to meditate can be achieved without Headspace.
Some app tabs are not working/won't load
I love the content. But what's with availability. Doesn't load at all. Crashes all the time. Horrible experience
Nice app. Could you please allow connecting to Samsung Health? Right now you only support Google Fit.

The crashing issue seems to be fixed now so I can open the app whenever I want. It however is so slow to navigate with each page taking considerable time to load which is somewhat annoying (never used to be a problem).

I consider myself a patient person, but the headspace app is a trash fire. Bugs: 1. (fixed!) Failure to load. 2. when changing between screens it will refuse to show "Explore" page and only show Home 3. while using the 8h sleep sounds, it will randomly crash at night (luckily quietly) 4. (Fixed!) the application won't load! I've been paying customer for years but I'd love to know how to get a refund due to unusable apps. edit: update fixed the big one. 2/3 still occur regularly.
The new update isn't bad. Wish there were more sleepcasts put out though. It would also be cool to have a Dark mode option.

I have been using headspace for years, paying the annual membership but the app is ALWAYS having problems, I can't open the app in my google pixel 7 pro. Even the day I can open. it's so slow and so lag. What is I paying for?? Any free apps in my phone are working well but this one charged!
It just doesn't work anymore.

I had had a great experience so far but lately the app takes way too long to load, not just at the start but every time you try to change the page. Really poor service now. I really hope Headspace is working to fix this.
since the recent update it keeps crashing and running really slow. very frustrating as ive used the sleep casts fir 3 years and never had an issue until now

The fact that you need a subscription to do basic meditation sessions with guidance that can be found in other apps or over the Internet for free is surprisingly scummy. I get trying to turn a profit but to do it in such a manner revolving around mental health is shocking.
Recently very laggy and slow to load meditations and sleep casts to the point it's unusable. Really disappointed as used to be great.
Unable to cancel membership. This is such a scam. Dont Purchase
app takes a while to load sometimes, I wish the search function showed up categories - it's hard to explore related audios to a topic if it isn't directly mentioned in the title.

Installed as it was advertised as having some free content. Created a mandatory account and declined to enter credit card details. All content I can see in the app is locked - if there is really free content, there's no way to search or filter for it. Tried asking their AI, Ebb, to recommend free mediations and got the classic confused-AI experience where it kept saying "Sure! You're correct, that one was not free, let me look up a free one for you" and then recommending another locked option.
says its free but then immediatly asks you to pay for a subscription. shame on you for cashing in on peoples mental health

They have fixed the recent technical issue that caused it to freeze at times. The customer support in response to my complaint about that issue was prompt and friendly. Also, the app's Move section is excellent. So many great options for mindful movement - great instructors and all the videos I've tried are very easy to follow (not the usual awkwardness of following along over a phone).
Application became extremely slow or even not working sometimes. Canceled my subscription.

EDIT since the last update, ALL MY DOWNLOADED MEDIATIONS ARE UNAVAILABLE. I realised this on a flight without WiFi... :( Then 1. the app now takes 30 seconds to load after opening instead of the 0,5-1 seconds it used to take 2. changing tabs will also take several (if not tens of) seconds 3. I can no longer see which of the daily exercises/meditations I've already completed. this was possible in the previous version. 4. the anxiety check in button doesnt work. I hope this gets fixed!

used to be 5 stars until this latest update. I've noticed it getting buggier: slow to respond; slow to load; occasional crashes. But now I must restart several times to get a sleepcast or sleep music playing. I select the desired media, then it loads forever, even the loading animation begins to stutter and freeze, with no recourse but to restart. Perhaps the undesired AI Ebb is using too many resources? And why did they screw with the UI? It was great before, now it's crowded and confusing.

It used to be excellent, however, lately it is extremely slow to load, if it does at all. Switching between screens has become slow and glitchy. The app has become bloated with extra fluff making it increasingly frustrating to find quality content. I originally loved it for assisting meditation, but now it is over run with short advice clips that you must sift through. It's sort of defeating its purpose by adding frustration to the user experience.

I spend 95% of my time on this app using the sleepscapes, and don't get me wrong, I LOVE them. But after some recent updates, the app has been MUCH slower to load and freezes/fails to load far more often than it did. 5 stars if this could please be fixed :]
There is no ability to play a video or audio In the main menu, there is just an empty page Also if a user tries to launch something, it will be an empty page as well

one of the worst app experience. non responsive UI. web works much better. Using with mobile browser is much faster and able to search where as it is not possible with app. sluggish UI, barely works. instead of meditation it's training our patience. being pro member is waste of money.
100% paywalled. It's not even a one-time purchase, it's a subscription. Rent chasing mental health? Truly dystopian. I'd give it 0 stars, if I could.
Content great. App is very poorly optimised, very very slow, sometimes I have restart the app just to change tabs.

Buggy, tediously slow to refresh homepage, sync with Google Fit doesn't work at all (doesn't track meditation sessions in GFit), in-app stats are truly as basic as it gets. On the upside, lots of quality meditation courses/activities to choose from. Basically, it's as if really smart meditation experts got together and hired a sub-par developer to create an equally sub-par technical experience.

The therapy was good and I was getting a lot out of it. However, I found out my job provides this service as a benefit and that we get 6 sessions without charge per calendar year. I had already paid for a couple sessions and then I found out my job pays for the sessions. I asked for a credit and they refuse to give me a credit or respond to my emails. Basically, they wanted to be paid twice, once from my employer and then from me.

i liked the app and my employer was paying for it so I didn't mind the cost, but I lost that job last year and I explicitly set it to not renew, but today I got charged nonetheless. I tried to cancel, but it says it's still active for another year. I want my money back. I don't use this app anymore.
I really like the new UI
Really slow to load, pretty unimpressed how the quality of the user interface has gone down over the last year or so. No longer worth the subscription in my opinion.
Everything is paid
I used to use it but will no longer support it until they remove the AI, Ai has caused suicides now and should not be used a tool anywhere near people suffering from mental health problems. Do better
not long enough

It's funny how an app which is supposed to bring calm and peace is so infuriating. I love Andy's guided meditation but the app frequently can't play daily meditations, or it defaults to 3 min and I need to set it again and again to 20 min, or it won't play 'downloaded' meditations when you're offline, or the 'downloaded' meditations stop mid way through... The old version had issues but not as many. This app can't be recommended as is. Shame 😔
I'm on my phone if thats not enough verification i choose not to do this. I do not need to go get another device to meditate. thanks anyway

The sleep meditations are too short, and the ones that should be quiet and calming (like sleep) start with a jarring voice that sounds like an ad. Ebb is fun but it gets my requests wrong. I remember the original Headspace was very simple and cute which made me want to meditate. this new app is overwhelming. Every time I use it, I get turned off. Also - use a compressor on the voices so there's less dynamic range. the uneven volume makes for a poor listening experience. I will not be renewing.
I have an annual subscription. But this month I can't access any of the courses or daily updates or music. It's the worse service I am getting.

the app is not working at all for the last two days, have uninstalled and reinstalled several time but of no use, the app is getting slower day by day. sometimes it does not open, some time it gets hanged

Meditations are still helpful... when the app actually works. ever since adding AI to the app, it's become bloated and unresponsive. Loved this app for years, but now it does not even work. No meditation will load and the UI is excruciatingly slow. Love having stress from a non functioning app when it is supposed to be helping me relax
doesn't load anything
anytime I click into the app to use it when needing to use a meditation, I get the spinning wheel of doom. never loads promptly. really not great when needed for mental health
It's a good app but for at least a couple of weeks I've been getting errors when trying to play breathing exercises videos. Hope you can fix it soon.

Victim of the enshitification trap. Ever since the upsell to therapy started the load time are up. won't retain my preferred meditation durations so I have to set them every morning. Won't down load enough of the meditation to keep playing during the section of my commute that goes through a cell phone dead spot. AI conversation... yeah that's not wellness as I want to experience it. It's a shame I love the content so much, it's nearly a subscription ending pile of garbage.
Google Fit integration issue is back. No points are recognised in Vitality again

Not able see the dashboard, only seeing grey screen with bottom navs. If I navigative to different tabs some of the flows are visible but clicking on them makes me enter this grey screen again. On a premium sub, but in deadlock.

I have used and loved this app for years, it introduced me to meditation. Lately it has been painfully slow (sometimes not loading at all) and I can't help but think that some of the additions (AI) are probably the cause. Support give very obvious solutions that don't work and Headspace seem to care more now about being flashy than being useful. After 8 yrs of use, I won't be subscribing again. Had to take off another star because even the online version doesn't work properly and I can't search.

This app is great. It's literally changed my life. But the usability of the app is terrible. Why are downloads always so hard to find?! Since the update a while ago it's been super buggy. To the point I give up using it at times. I only resubscribed because I was given a huge discount. Otherwise it's overpriced.

Dear devs. Ebb is a horrible idea. it needs a lot of tweaking. I thought I'd give it a try and I ended up feeling worse. I was ok before that!😄 maybe reconsider. aaand now the app freezes and crashes after a few seconds open
so many options and activities and classes and sound scapes available, you never run out of material!
Nothing free that I could find apart from 2 minute videos, I remember 5+ years ago more options but now it's just filled with subscription based content. Don't get me started on their AI chat bot...
great content, let down by an almost unusably slow interface
why change layout 3 times every full moon? Favorites are gone missing again

App has been ruined by the latest update (Oct 2025). Not restful, not helpful when trying to fall asleep. Terrible for an app I actually subscribe to.
SCAM. Will not give a refund even though I contacted them less than 24 hours after they charged me.
I find myself opening this app less and less because it's painfully slow to load anything.
nothing is free and app is confusing

Every so often I get a different/new UI, and when I do i find that my sessions don't synch with Google Fit. The one I currently have (which works) is the classic one that's been there for a few years. Update back on new ui and synch still not working. Please fix it.
Not sure what happened. Been using the app for years and it's been fine, but lately it is so slow it's practically unusable. Guess I'll cancel my subscription since I literally can't use it.
Always freezes, takes ages to open, even after taking annual subscription not able to use the app when I need it most. Better go for other apps like balance or calm, disappointed..
blank screen when logged in, more stressed than bfore I started!

I've used this app for almost 10 years however I find the most recent updates to be very poor. The app crashes half way through a meditation or sleep cast. doesn't register your hours or streak. Very slow to respond. Plus the bright white background on the sleep section is awful when you try to play a new sound in the middle of the night and you are blinded by a white background. Overall the most recent updates are putting me off using Headspace and I find myself switching to Spotify.
horrible app

it could be this latest app version or compatibility with my moto g86 but the app keeps crashing mid way through a meditation. I have cleared cache, reinstalled and still experiencing issues. I have ended up using the website to keep my meditation streak. very frustrating.
didnt get very far as you have to pay money monthly

Great meditations and courses, but the app is not intuitive and makes me feel stressed. If I'm doing a course, a series of meditations, and I heart one of them, I would love a way to get to the others in the course via this, but you can't. It also seems to get stuck going back to my home area so I have to shut the app and try again multiple times.
Gray screen every time I select something

SCAM alert. False information from support. Help desk suggests that I get a refund from Google Play and they already knew that this is not possible since it's a subscription. The app crashes constantly. When it does work, the app doesn't allow me to select the program I want to use. Constant advertising inside the paid app. A sea of frustration.

I have been using this app for more than 2 years now. It helped me to recover from anxiety but all of a sudden, the app is crashing on my device. Now I can't play any audio and the home screen appears blank and grey. Please fix this

I like the meditations, but the app itself is horrible. Frequent freezes and crashes. UX for findability mediocre as meditations and courses are very broadly categorized. I would love to rate this app better. But I can't. Dealing with it is a mindfulness exercise on its own.
the app does not show home page or meditations page for me

This used to be my favourite meditation app, however they randomly changed the subscription price half way this year and the amount I've paid for at the start of the year is not being taken into consideration for my previous subscription. Basically I've paid for a subscription at the start of the year but they are asking me to pay again for an annual subscription. edit: it also crashes a lot now especially when you're part way through a mediation.... edit 2: the app has cancelled my sub again

Very disappointed in this app. Scheduled my first coaching session. The app kept kicking me out of the session for no reason. Wouldn't let me send messages. The coach couldn't connect to the chat either, at times. Sleep stories sometimes just randomly pause. There are very long periods of silence in sleep stories, which makes no sense at all. App constantly freezes and crashes. It actually will create anxiety as opposed to relieve it when you use this app. Uninstalling.

love headspace and would be 5 star if it wasn't for the recent update and the homepage change. Used to be so intuitive and set out a daily meditation plan for me, which felt like achievements. Now it's just a bunch of meditations thrown together, not enough cohesion.
Used to 'just work', now as of current release won't even load. Frequent lock ups cut offs and crashes. Please fix!

​I was once a huge proponent of this app, promoting it to family and friends. However, after resubscribing recently, I am deeply disappointed and can no longer recommend it. ​The entire user experience has degraded significantly. Performance is poor (the app is slow to open), stability is worse (it crashes frequently in the background on my S25), and the primary reason for using it is broken: my sleepcasts stop playing randomly right as I’m trying to fall asleep.

Headspace is ok. I'm not sure it works much for me. I will say I am strongly against the gamification of everything. An app about meditation should not be keeping a Streak count which just adds to life stress for some who worry about losing their streak.
I love this app! Since the beginning with the initial meditations and now with a mix of new options to meditate. Highly recommended!
replyContent: We have had several reports of this happening on Android devices and have already notified our engineers of the matter. I want to inform you that a fix for this will be launched next week, but please reach out to our team at help@headspace.com if you have any questions!

content: App keeps crashing (like everyone else) since early October 2025. I pay for premium and the content on the app is great. I have been a Headspace fan for 8yrs. But the app keeps crashing and won't work now. Meaning I've wasted lots of time just trying to load a daily 10 minute meditation. The app needs a proper fix or they will lose their loyal users. We're paying a pretty expensive subscription for something that doesn't work at the moment. Please fix this ASAP Headspace!
app has started to crash randomly and doesn't play audios
all the sleep stuff is exact same as free stuff on YouTube etc.instant uninstall
it could be a good app, I don't know though, because there is literally nothing you can do with the free version.
v v slow- doesnt load only

I am very disappointed with the app’s performance. After paying the full annual subscription fee, the app did not load properly despite several attempts. I decided to unsubscribe, but I have not received any refund yet.
app is NOT WORKING. I paid for a year's premium use but I can't use it. i would like a refund :(

I've noticed from a few weeks now that my semi-guided meditation of 15 minutes is getting paused automatically at 9:45... And I have to un paused it manually to continue meditating... This is really bothering as I'm taking more than the 15 minutes to meditate and I'm unable to do my session in one part. October 2025 update, the above keeps happening every now and then, but with the latest updates now the app is really slow and often pops up errors that don't allow you to start your meditation.
replyContent: Hello, thank you for making us aware of this issue. Please reach out with your information to our support team at help@headspace.com. We look forward to assisting you!

content: I've had this app for several years. I stopped using it for a while and came back and the issues are endless and developers don't seem to care. I see so many reviews complaining about the same things.... app stops working in the middle of streams regularly, sometimes several times in a row. It's infuriating! And why would you change the interface into a layout that's LESS user-friendly?! I hate it, and so do many others. It's such a hassle now to get to what I want. This app is a disappointment

Bumped it lower after the update. Crashes way too often and freezes on some pages. Loads much slower, sometimes I have to close it and reload. It logs me out too often and fails login using Google several times before working. It doesn't indicate which podcasts I've listened to already in Radio Headspace. It's become rather clunky, not better.

I'm having the same issue as a lot of people after the update where the app takes long to load and when it eventually does, the morning session (and I suspect the afternoon and night ones too) just stays blank. The audio plays but there is no graphic in the background, just a black screen. And then when, for example the breathing session finishes, it just hangs there and it doesn't go back to the home screen. Please fix it straight away because I actually just paid for a 1-year subscription.
After the recent update, the app is not loading at all. uninstalling and re-installing didn't help. neither did clearing cache and storage data. headspace still works when using a web browser though.

While I have briefly used the app before, it seems extremely un-optimized especially when you consider the payment you make to be a member. While the account settings and explore tabs load properly the today tab just shows a grey screen. Unacceptable for a paid subscription.

I've enjoyed using the app over the years but the past few versions of the app over the past months are incredibly glitchy to use to the point the app is super delayed and unreliable. Headspace does offer IT help and have tried but have been unable to fix it. The customer service team said they were unable to offer a refund for the remainder of my subscription and did offer a discount code for another years subscription but as the app doesn't really work anymore this is not helpful.
App is no longer functioning reliably. it just loads and loads and sometimes doesn't load at all.
new ui takes forever to load, its not in same order in reverse and just overall bad experience

A buggy mess with a lot of good content. Theoretically, this App has lots of positive features from meditation, over podcasts & soundscapes to yoga & fitness. But when a PAID(!) meditation app frustrates you regularly, because it freezes, loads forever or gets stuck in a loop when you try to access your downloaded (!) content ( yes, some people are NOT always online, and that's what downloads should be for, right?!), then it kinda misses the point and might be the exact opposite of helpful. :/

The app keeps bugging out and crashing almost every day. It crashed mid-session or the app just lags on opening and says "Headspace is not responding, wait or close app", and selecting wait never works because it stays bugging out. And closing the app and restarting has the same issue. Please fix it because we're paying for the premium experience, and this isn't it.

App used to be amazing, but its terrible lately. I have a premium account, which isn't cheap, but I've had it for several years now. I use the Sleepscapes for going to sleep at night, which was the only thing that saved me after insomnia. But recent months, the app has been going downhill. Recents don't update. The heart for favourites are gone. And now for the last week the app won't even load so I can't access anything, not even my account to cancel my recurring payment.

I've been a paying subscriber since 2022. In the last couple of weeks something happened cause the app now crashing every time i use it... :( , Google Fit doesn't count my meditation time anymore. Very disappointed. :(
the content is great, but recently the app constantly shuts down making it impossible to use properly :(
app is very glitchy
extremely extremely slow app
only male voices now. some creepy. they removed moonlight aquarium. and other female voices.
Doesn't work anymore. Nothing loads and it just crashes. Really unfortunate,especially as thís is a paid for app.

I love the content, but this must be the least reliable app I have installed. it hangs on opening. It crashes mid session. If I pause a session, it crashes and loses my progress. Sharing sessions is unreliable. Am I just meant to notice the frustration and let it pass?
The content is great, particularly the sleepcasts. But the app crashes daily and often loses my daily streak to the point I have just turned it off.

replyContent: We apologize to hear you are experiencing interruptions to your journey with this current issue. Please reach out with your information to our support team at help@headspace.com so we may troubleshoot and further investigate to pass along the information to our engineers. We look forward to hearing from you!

WARNING: Strict Annual Auto-Renewal Policy / No Refunds ​I was charged the full annual fee for this digital service which I had completely forgotten about and not used in months. I contacted Headspace support immediately after the charge, but they cited a strict, inflexible no-refund policy. They will not reimburse you for unused time, even for a digital product with zero activity. Set strong calendar reminders to cancel early—their renewal policy is aggressive.

replyContent: We're sincerely sorry to hear you're encountering this issue and would like to assist you on continuing your mindfulness journey. Please email our support team at help@headspace.com. We look forward to assisting you.

I've been using Headspace for years after being recommended it by my psychologist. I love its user-friendly, evidence-based approach with a huge library of guided meditations, focused courses, podcasts, guided physical exercise videos (workouts, stretches, etc) and more. Its new AI, Ebb, has also been incredibly helpful despite me being very sceptical at first. Headspace makes taking time out for your mind really accessible and engaging. Highly recommend.

I love Headspace and use the app nearly every day for my practice but I there are some small things that frustrate me each time. Mainly about the fact that there is no way to save your preferences, which means I have to select my preferred meditation duration and teacher every time I listen to a meditation as it always defaults to Andy at 3 minutes. This small change would make for such a smoother, more personalised experience.

Headspace changed my life 6 years ago, as introduction to mindfulness & daily meditation practice. Andy's lessons were and still are invaluable to anyone looking to get started with this. Sadly I've had to cancel my subscription as the app is now unbearable. Crashes, fails to load, forgets details & preferences. Forced, unwanted "AI companion" that I can't turn off. Daily changes to the UI; flips between classic & updated versions randomly. Customer support says "use the web version". Great.

Note: this updated review score is for the app only, not the content. The app continues, even 5 years later, to be underwhelming, confusing, and often buggy. Almost nothing appears to be stored on your device (despite a 300-400 MB download size), meaning every time you load a page in the app, everything is downloaded as if you're browsing a webpage. This means Headspace is an absolute data hog if you're trying to conserve data usage.

Getting slower and more buggy every day. Haven't been able to use it the last 3 nights because it keeps crashing. Have tried all the things - uninstall/re-install, restarting. Will be moving to a free app or Spotify instead.

replyContent: Hi Ian, thank you so much for your feedback! We've been made aware of this issue and are working to resolve it. Please be sure to keep your app up to date! We appreciate your patience as we determine a solution.
