The experience with the app is unpleasant. I'm just at the end of my trial and won't be renewing. For one, loading times are so long, not just at boot but simply for switching tabs, or gets stuck and needs to be rebooted. Getting annoyed at an app is not what I want when I'm looking for peace! The other thing is the UI, it used to be that the home tab was split by time of day now it's much more confusing than before, feels like I have to look for things myself but as a new user it's not great.
Are you serious? 5000 huf /month?
Easy to use. No pressure from a streak or reward system etc. Feeling the kindness and care from the app. Various activities and exercices to suit what I need on the moment.

I never write a review but this app is just so glitchy!! The content is great, however, the app is so frustratingly slow that I just cannot continue to use it. Really wish I'd read the reviews first. It takes up to a minute to load a page and you're staring at the loading wheel of death. What a massive massive shame. Will be requesting a refund!

Content in this app is great, recent version of app itself has horrible functionality. Loads slowly, often requiring multiple attempts. Requires constant restarts to clear "You're currently offline" messages (despite strong WiFi connection) w/ associated limited app functions. Quits w/ no warning during meditations, requiring a restart. It used to be a good app. Don't waste your money until this version is fixed.
replyContent: We appreciate that you've provided your feedback and we're sorry for the technical trouble. If you'd like to send an email to help@headspace.com we'd be happy to assist further.

content: Latest update has now broken "the wake up". Am puzzled as to who at headspace looked at their major USP, a simple reliable app, and thought "let's make this complex and buggy". Sort of goes against the whole point of a meditation app.
Long load times, constantly switching UI, and frustrating problems with playing sleepcasts. Using the app is causing more frustration than it's relieving with recent updates.
Contents do not load. Unable to delete courses. I am stuck with one for 4 years!

edit: knocking off another star because the app keeps crashing now. I mainly use it for the focus music and it constantly crashes. or if I pause the music, minimise the app to do something else, and then bring the app back, it resets and tries to reopen the home screen but gets stuck on a loading loop and I have to constantly close it and reopen it. please sort this app out, it used to be so good and now it's not. // The recent addition of AI is unnecessary and has made the app laggy and slow.
Me ayudó un montón con el insomnio 🙂‍↕️

Each time in ready to fall asleep the app always crashes. I have used this app for years and since this recent update it always crashes and puts up a notification that "somthing went wrong". Please fix I miss not having to worry about this.
App constantly crashes. I really don't understand how this has been a problem for years that has yet to be addressed.

app recently got a new coat of paint but still really poor UI so confusing, app got super slow too always spinning wheel . mish mash of random guided meditations and no clear proper path to actually teaching you mindfulness and it's concepts, it's really disappointing.
replyContent: Thanks for your feedback and we're sorry to hear you're having trouble navigating the app. When you get a moment, we recommend reaching out at help@headspace.com. We will be happy to help with the app, and with content recommendations for longer sessions.

content: sessions not loading anymore....

The app is wonderfully designed to help you meditate, but the trouble is it takes too long to open the sessions and also sometimes after multiple attempts also you are not able to play the session or even navigate into the app.
i can't use this app ryt now it's shows u have to subscribe again ,but I hv valid plan for one whole year
notification reminder dont work (yes everything configured and authorized). hard to find meditation that is not guided by some guru.

App frequently "hangs" with a spinning donut. Restart cures the problem but only temporarily. Glad I haven't had to pay for my subscription (I get it as part of Vitality insurance plan). Google Pixel 9 Pro running Android 16
Really helpful with sleep anxiety. This has been a game changer for me.

The app user interface was great before the recent update. It used to be so intuitive where it opens with a main page showing the daily activities (Breathing Exercise of the day, Daily Meditation etc.) with big thumbnails and you can scroll up and down. Now, it looks cluttered and has side scrolling menus. Please bring back the simple design. I instinctively stopped using the app daily because of the update.

What happened to Ebb chat?? Is it gone now?? I don't like the new interface. It's hard to find anything and the page doesn't load much of the time. As a side note, you need to show more variety on who is featured on the guided videos, etc. Your feed on every page looks more like a political statement. You're clearly excluding groups you don't like.

I have been using this app for years and loving it, however the latest update is totally broken. the landing page no longer shows daily routines. Loading pages is totally broken and requires a restart. the app will error mid-meditation leaving me to have to eventually stop meditating on my own because I haven't heard any guidance for a while. The app no longer remembers basic preferences like how long I like to meditate or preferred teacher. the latest version is garbage
the app doesn't load or work! it's terrible. kind of a joke
the app is SO insanely slow. took almost ten minutes to make an account, only to find out that practically everything is locked behind a pricey paywall. immediately uninstalled.
is this app free?
this app is junk. constantly buffers no matter what I'm using 4G, 5G, fiber optic wifi. It takes 30-40 seconds between screens or does not work at all. I'm angry i paid for it

I have used the free trial and unsubscribed from the app , yet the app kept taking money from my account until they have successfully taken an annual subscription fee. this app wasn't what I needed and I left it after few minutes of looking through it, yet I have been charged an annual fee of $92. Beware of unsubscribing from free trial as it is not an obvious process. I had to cancel my cards and had to get my bank involved UNACCEPTABLE
Horrible experience.This app did not work.I canceled it within two days and they still charged me seventy dollars
the content is great! but this is probably the most unreliable app I've ever used. constantly crashes or won't load.

Been using this app since 2019, and it's helped me through many tough moments in my life. Their new feature Ebb has also been a game changer in terms of helping me find the exact guided meditation practices and other resources depending on what my needs are.

So, I've recently reinstalled and resubscribed to Headspace after a few years away. The sheer amount - and general quality of - the content is outstanding... but dear god the app is now SO buggy. I can't go 'back' from any screen without the whole thing crashing. Have uninstalled and redownloaded, same issues. Please fix!

Ironically, the bugs in the Headspace app are so frequent that I could do with another app to help me de-stress after using it. Screens can take minutes to load, if they load at all. There's also an unusual bug where the navigation at the bottom of the screen will change place. I messaged support about the poor experience and requested for my subscription to be refunded - their suggestion was to use the website through a browser on my phone instead of the app.
There use to be a screen where it showed morning, afternoon and evening recommendations. it's been replaced by ebb which doesn't give good recommendations

Thank you to the creators of headspace! I've been trying to find a bit of peace of mind for a long time and with the help of this app even though it's new to me I think I might finally make some progress so thank you!
I am already loving it here on day 2.
The app constantly switches between two different designs. It seems your A/B testing has a bug, please fix

While it's a great app, it's now so bloated that things take far too long to load. Different pages and tabs take longer to load than most other apps. For this particular session I actually got frustrated waiting and moved over to a different meditation app. Sort it out pls.
You know what's a headache? Having to login for EVERYTHING. Can't some things just exist without a username and password?
glitchy on my andriod. sometime I get just a white screen, sometimes I'll get the spinning circle sometimes I have to stop uninstall and reinstall the app
love this app, but it's gotten so slow recently. even just the home page and navigating through meditations is so slow.

I like the content; I've been using it for stress and to help me sleep, and I think it is effective. That said, the app is terrible; it's constantly showing error messages. I was following one of the courses and one day it just stopped working. The content wouldn't open on my phone. I reported it and their help team said they would get on it at some point. Last night the app wouldn't open; today it has logged me out and won't let me back in - it says my email isn't registered with them anymore

Downloaded meditations cannot be accessed when in airplane mode. After opening, the app only shows a loading circle and after a few minutes the following message "Hmm...that's weird Something went wrong. Could you try again in a few moments?" Reinstalling did not work and also not on a different phone. Otherwise great for meditation, as long as you have Internet.

Really enjoy the meditation practices. Well designed and very helpful. I use the app almost every day. Can't give it 5 stars, however, because it has been awfully glitchy since the last update. Often very slow to load. And some workout videos shut down without explanation. Hoping for a fix soon.
Great concept, sadly without premium you can't do anything.
great app but can take a longer time to load sometimes
the app is almost unusable now. It just buffers and buffers. I shouldn't have to use the website 😕

never experienced such an insane app and will have to end subscription. the library was annoying to navigate in the first place, the recommendations never made much sense to me and the categorisation and labelling of content was pretty bad. But this has been exacerbated recently by different bits of the UI swapping back and forth every couple of days. confusing to the point of unusable.

I once loved this service for the calming voice of Andy... still do. But over the years, this app has gotten so clunky and things keep changing and getting awfully hard! They're now trying to make it look similar to TikTok's UI, which is so antithetical to the spirit of meditation! Just bring back the legacy 2018 UI!
free trials and pay walls, left right and centre. looks like a nice app despite that.

Es ist fast unmöglich die Wertigkeit dieser "Inhalte" mit wenigen Worten zu beschreiben. Es handelt sich tatsächlich um eine Lebenseinstellung die auf lange Sicht "Life-changing" sein kann, falls man sich ernsthaft damit auseinander setzt. Technik: Sehr ansprechend, vielfältig, einfach zu nutzen. Einzig die "Offline-Nutzung" lässt zu wünschen übrig. Bei schlechter oder gar keiner Datenverbindung kann oft kein Inhalt abgespielt werden, nicht einmal die Vorab-Downloads.
Used the app years ago and decided to try it again - literally everything is behind a paywall. None of it is free anymore. No sleep music no nothing. Not to mention the use of AI. Please stop.

Reduced review from 5 star to 2. App updated a month ago, since then there are 2 main issues that have not been fixed. 1) When I try to select different presenters and meditation lengths, the app will regularly crash and restart requires. 2) Previously could select my favorite presenter (Eve) and time (10 minutes) and app would default to this when opened. Now it always resets to Andy and 3 which would be fine, but app crashes when I try to change from this. Not good for paid subscription.

The main experience of this app is watching a spinner, which is not relaxing at all. When it decides to load, I can never find something useful. most of the time I close the app and start something from Apple Music in seconds. At this stage there is no way I keep my subscription.

I'm changing my rating from 5 starts to 1. the app has been very buggy over the last 2 weeks. it's buggy in different ways each time - sometimes the bar at the bottom shows up in different orders, sometimes the screen blinks, sometimes links lead to nowhere. sometimes restarting the app helps but usually it doesn't.
It often takes 2+ attempts to load pages, and has now crashed in the middle of a meditation. Too buggy to be usable.

Great app, why 2 stars? They keep changing the format and layout back and forth. There is no consistency. Which is ironic because coming back for meditation consistently is key 😅. Change is fine but not every second week.

I don't know if anyone else is experiencing the audio cutting out/ turning off at random times. sometimes it says error on the screen and sometimes doesn't show anything. that is one aspect of the site that's now becoming unreliable.

Don't do it! I cancelled on the 14th day of free trial and was charged later that day! After several emails to customer service and screen shots ( which they asked for) of my cancellation and the payment, they still refused to refund the 69.99 to my bank acct. buyer beware.

I have enjoyed this app until this last update. The daily refresh and streak counter time got changed. I meditate at 4 am before my work day to prepare. Since the update it is still showing the previous days recommendations and doesn't contribute to my streak if I take the time to find a meditation I want to do. I know this likely seems small but it has negatively impacted my desire to continue interacting with the headspace app.
won't let me cancel my subscription. very predatory app

Definitely not worth the money. And when it automatically renewed for an entire year, I requested to cancel so it wouldn't autorenew again, so they literally canceled my account so I can't access what I paid for 🤦🏼‍♀️
replyContent: We appreciate you sharing your feedback and we're sorry to hear you didn't enjoy your experience. We will make sure to pass along your feedback. If you have any other feedback or need help with anything, please send us a note at help@headspace.com for assistance.

content: I think it's an amazing app and I love how many options they have for so many different things. But I hold back on giving it the full 5 stars because this app is so slow. No matter where I am, even if I'm connected to good wifi, it takes forever to load.

I love using this app. it's really helped me improve my meditation skills. Using it every morning before work helps me get through my day. However there have been days where I've missed out on my meditations because the app was either too slow loading or glitchy. I find I have to force stop the app a lot to fix it.

2017 4/5 after the app update. Love it. Edit 2025: The last couple of weeks they've been changing the qpp back and forth between the old and a new design. I prefer the new one, especially the player which is much faster. But it's more annoying that's it's different every time i open it. Lifetime subscriber. Dumping score to 1/5. If you're gonna start A/B testing, do it right.
I unsubscribed and still trying to attempt to take payment

Been using it more than 7 years. It used to be simple to use, percise and effective. Since then, many features have been added, to accommodate for "trends". To me, the application now is like going to the jungle, trying to find the essense. For me, Andy was enough, and the simplicity was what matters, because at the end only practice and techniques make a lasting effect.. I think it is time to get back to the origins, and dump the contemporary trends. The app is going backwards...
Stopped syncing with Google fit completely now
replyContent: Thank you for reaching out. We are sorry for the trouble. Please send us a note to help@headspace.com and we'd be happy to assist further.

content: love it, but loading tabs is laggy (stuck on a white page) and i miss the alternative breathing exercises
good .

it's the middle of rhe night, I can't sleep, and the app is forcing me to upgrade. Although, it will not finish upgrading no matter what I do. I've even tried deleting other apps and photos in case it's an issue on my phone's end, rather than the app's, but it still won't upgrade. This has done the absolute opposite of help me get back to sleep.

seems neat, but I was just here for the Flutter demo 😂. nice work overall. although, I think there are some "safe area" issues near the bottom of the screen for some of your pages. the android menu covers up the bottom and I can't scroll to tap that section.

I really dislike the new homepage. It's busy-looking and I can't figure out what I've done for the day. Bring back the daily timeline and I'll be happy to improve the rating! The content itself is great.

the app is so buggy its not even funny. it would power off my phone because of how bad it was glitching. on top of that, this is NOT for everyone regardless of where they live. i tried for two hours to set up a psychiatry appointment, only to find out that they dont offer it where i love. this wasn't told to me once in the four DAYS i had the app. complete waste of my time.

The app used to have a decent amount of free resources to use, but now it is all locked. There is no point in getting the app unless you are willing to pay for it (I would not). Disappointed in the current version of this app and deleted my account since I can no longer use any of the resources for free.
Tried logging in with Google. Was told by the app that that email is connected to a social account (??) and that I should try logging in with a social account. 🤡 useless. uninstall.
Things fail to load or take an incredibly long time. Unintuitive navigation.

guided sessions don't work, you cannot get into them. have uninstalled several times, changed password and reached out to support twice and no reply. had this as a free version before through work, now I am paying and had problems with the above and pages take a bit to load. what's going on ?
the app is now glitchy and stops working after the update. im not sure what the change was but I may not renew.

I was quite excited when I discovered I got a year's subscription to this included in my work health plan but I'm really disappointed. It's very slow to open, glitchy once you get in and hard to find what I'm looking for. I joined the guided sleep program but everytime I go into the app, I struggle to find the next session. It's basically creating more stress in my life than it's resolving!

This app is a waste of time. Equally valuable content can be found for free elsewhere. I complained about my dissatisfaction and tried to get a refund but was faced with a back and forth situation between Headspace and Google Play which delayed by refund to the point where Google Play is now pointing to their policy and saying I'm too late, meanwhile Headspace continues to say that Google Play has to issue the refund. Google Play also says that Headspace has the money and can issue the refund.
I can't click the guided programs

I've been using the app for many years now and I really like how the library has grown through this time. All the videos and podcasts are very interesting. However after the latest update half of the videos don't load! Neither the breathing excersises work! Which is very annoying and has disrupted my meditation routine!! I've sent them an email as well but received no reply.

Trying to login using Google ouath. saying it's already linked with another social. now I can't remember that. you should help user with that. poor experience. also why no option to view the app without signing in?
latest update is not great, keeps crashing the white noise set for 480 minutes since the update.

I love this app and its content The only problem is that the app is not stable ,easily glitches and freezes. This doesn't happen to any other app on my phone. I've tried deleting and downloading the app but it's still the same. I hope this technical issue will be fixed soon

I am no longer able to access the any of the Guided Programs that are offered in the app. Every time I try to choose one, it goes back to that same page. Please fix this! Or, if these are located somewhere else, make them easier to find. I've looked through the library and I can't find them, not that I'm aware. Thank you!

been using this app for years. Mostly fine, but whatever update you last made is horrible. takes forever to load and is so so buggy. I can no longer access the daily meditation. The UX is overly complicated. And I'm paying for this! Contacted support to no avail. get it together, headspace.
they've put everything behind a paywall

So helpful, thank you, but also so infuriating! The history and search features are awful. I start a course and it doesn't record the history and it is sometimes difficult to find again. Please fix this!!

I downloaded this app for the "Finding Your Best Sleep" guided program. When I click on the program, it will not work. What is the point in providing services that do not work properly? How ironic that the app I downloaded to lessen my stress is actually increasing it.

Love content, new UI is nightmare. I just want to use the sleepcasts. Accessing them became a little more cumbersome with the layout change over a year ago, but tolerable. With the latest changes I have to select favorites, but then I can still only see 2 at a time, 90% of the screen is a busy mess that is decidedly not sleep inducing. Please show a list of favorited items that fills the screen when Favorites is chosen. I pay for this, but I won't if you don't deliver what I want.
The app is an innavigable, clunky, bloated mess (and keeps getting worse), but the meditations are pleasant, accessible, and have been very beneficial for me over time.

have loved this app for many years but recent updates have rendered it quite buggy, slow and unresponsive. often have to close the app and restart which can be annoying when you are trying to relax. can we sort this please?
great app, but since the recent redeisgn it's slow as hell and stalls at the end of meditations, essentially forgetting you've completed the meditation.
new UI takes FOREVER to load, didn't used to do this. I'm waiting ages for content I used to be able to get readily. please fix

i love this app have used the daily meditation for 7 years on a daily basis. however these days in my Sansung Fold7 and 25 Ultra when selecting the daily meditation the app starts flickering and then crashes very sad
is there a option to revert back to the old view the one that is arrange like Guided meditation wake up afternoon and sleep

Awful, took the full payment of £49.99 before my 14 day free trial ended. Still had 7 hours remaining to cancel. I have cancelled and no refund, not even a reply. Disgusting customer service. 0 stars isn't an option
Lots of options to find the techniques that work for me.

The latest update has absolutely trashed the ability to play offline content when offline. Previously, zero issues. Now, endless refreshing and crashing, on two different Pixel models. I rely on the app for white noise overnight. One cancelled subscription coming up if this isn't fixed pronto.

Like the sessions but app needs work. It's often very slow to load. I don't understand why you can download some sessions and not others. If you're following a course you have to go searching for it every day (not very calming!), I don't understand why an active course wouldn't show on the home page. That would be far more useful than the sessions I've already done.

As others have pointed out, the latest update is a mess for so many reasons. The UI/UX is simply terrible. You've made it so difficult to navigate the app it's borderline unusable. It's now also incredibly slow. Oftentimes, the content just doesn't load when switching tabs. You've also really broken the Google Fit sync, which means Vitality no longer tracks the activity, rendering that functionality useless. Please fix. There was nothing wrong with the app before all of this.

This app is really helpful and easy to use. The design is sleek, the content is great, and it helps me ease stress and feel relaxed. I recommend everyone to try it. I just wish the subscription was a bit more affordable so more people could benefit, as mental health is truly important
They destroyed it with the new version.
hate the air voiced meditations. hate the ai chatbot. just be human.
Downloaded meditation not working. I was successful in downloading the meditation sessions, but when I try to play them back when offline it just has a black screen and says "Buffering...".

Used to love this app and use it everyday. The recent changes have ruined it. No more suggestions for morning, afternoon, and evening. No way to see if you completed an activity. VERY SLOW to load now sleepcasts no longer have the narrator name which was helpful to make choices. No longer able to save a teacher choice or meditation length. History is almost nonexistent now. Dashboard is just very cluttered and busy now. It now thinks it is evening instead of morning so time zones are wrong.
I was looking for a free one but this app is not free which is unfortunate
I like the workouts and meditations, but there haven't been new workouts in a few years, which is a bummer. The app also crashes about 3 times per 20 minute workout video.

Please bring back the frequent or recent buttons on the homepage. September 2025 update: please stop changing the Android app UI. It worked fine before, now it's a lot more effort to get to my saved meditations.
good content but the app freezes quite often or is very slow
Slow, crashes constantly, audio just stops, and now there's an AI therapist? Not worth the effort.

won't sync to Google Fit!!! so the agreement with Vitality health insurance is void. I like the content. The recent update is slow to load, doesn't sync with Google Fit and randomly signs you out. It recently deleted my account but customer service was able to restart the account although I lost all my progress. cool app but needs a lot of work to make it run without issue. The idea is to reduce stress not create it.

latest update, using samsung mobile, will not sync with GoogleFit, constant crashes. please fix syncing issue and a revert back to previous layout would be perfect, it was so easy to use/navigate, but not now. I've uninstalled/reinstalled and still won't work,it's not a GoogleFit issue as my other apps all work with it, just not Headspace

App has serious performance issues. hangs after switching views. also what the heck happened to my Favorites? there is only a slim sliding bar with them. how do I get to a full page view? the app is getting busier and more difficult to navigate with every update.

Can't even use the app unless you pay. There's no free options at all offered. If it's a one time payment, sure, maybe I'd buy to use it. But subscription? Are you kidding me? Why does every app want subscription payments nowadays 🙄 Y'all don't care about mental health, you just care about making continuous money off of those that need help.

the UI is overwhelming and i never seem to find what I'm looking for. I keep starting short courses and can't find them again and things keep moving around all the time. i miss when this was a simple app.
App just turned stupid. I have to select instructor and meditation time every time which I didn't need to do earlier. Search and find was easier. interface looks a lot more cluttered now.

I have not seen something so unstructured in recent times. I got a 4 month pass from LinkedIn premium. I clicked claim now, it landed me on the headspace website where I was asked to login after logging nothing happened. it shows a QR to download the app and the opens normally with not premium features unlocked. I used other meditation apps too and those were clean and properly structured.

The latest update is terrible, it's beyond slow, the layout is a mess, the AI thing adds nothing and is irritating, and it also doesn't seem to log the sessions into Google Fit anymore (yes, I have turned the setting off and back on and re-authorised access). That last point is an issue for those of us with Vitality - if the sessions don't show in Google Fit, we don't get the Vitality points

Hello. I mostly use the Ebb reflection tab and soundscapes. Even though it's AI, it's one of the reasons Im still here in the world. It's also really nice to have access to a reflection history, I've been going through a very hard time with my inner battles and revisiting the reflections can help remind me of what I've learned about myself. Also, some people note the app stops playing background music, you may have to go back and fix some background permission settings on phone to prevent that

Came down from 5 stars. I love the app and use it since forever. but please don't follow all the tiktok trends. having the live progress bar visible under every video is super distracting for me. I don't want to know how far I am In the video when doing breath exercise. and please try to not gamify the app to much. it's ok to see a small progress stat at the end of a meditation, but after the new update I felt like ordering from a McDonald's terminal. "Would you like medi a, b, c with that"?

Been using it for years and I love the meditations and the sleepcasts especially. Though I have to say I'm not loving some of the newer AI voiced sleepcasts. Stick to real humans please 😊 Edit: was forced to upgrade today and he new version is definitely slower. There's a little loading circle that never used to appear before.
Great content! Giving 3 stars because of the new UI and UX. Why did you change the previous layout of the screens, it was easy to use. Now just confusing.

Good for relaxing before bed, I like the sleepscapes and one minute of breathing, one star taken off as my phone vibrates when clicking into some areas which is not ideal when trying to relax and can't seem to turn it off! Also after the new update the 'today' layout is too busy and confusing 😕

I have used headspace for years, the content is wonderful, but it's so buggy now. So often the tabs don't load, not sure what's going on! I can usually only use explore or history, the Today tab usually doesn't work.
fix offline mode

I used to love this app, but it has changed so much that it is almost unusable. The push of AI is disgusting. I used to be able to do all the suggested activities for the day, the wakeup, the meditation, the sleep cast, all on one page. Now I have to search for anything, avoid AI, and it's made it so much less enjoyable. I'm going to stop paying for it.

The most glitchy app I've ever had. Shame as it's obviously a beautiful tool and I've paid for premium for many years and will continue to do so despite the glitches. But unfortunately, the screen flashes with glitches continuously, audios freeze out mid-meditation, or they continue playing after clicking pause, ending, or closing the app, it doesn't correctly log the streak counter, amongst a few other things.
nightmare

app updated today and really don't like the new today page. it's cluttered and I miss the breath, daily meditation, my one course focusing on and then either the podcast or advice or other. now It is so cluttered and not fast to find what need. disappointed.

horrible update, the new app update is horrible I cant find any of the things I had to start my day. I got more stressed just trying to navigate the app and it took forever to load up. Do something or refund me.

Got charged for a year subscription, contacted them the very same day it happened, to cancel as it was a mistake. They basically told me tough luck and to keep the app for the year now. Poor customer service. edit: 1 year later they charged me again! even after their team told me they had canceled my auto renewal and ensuring I will not be charged further, and they just charged me again. this is freaking ridiculous. get it together.
very bad

I've been very happy with the guided meditation that headspace offers, and I'll continue to use the platform, but I'm very disappointed to see them jump on the AI bandwagon. AI has no place in this space where we are trying to connect to ourselves as humans. And not for nothing, but enshittification strikes everywhere, including with Headspace. The app has been getting slower to load with every needless visual overhaul to the app.

genuinely not a single thing you can do without buying a subscription. i want to get into meditation and thought this would be a good place to start, but apparently i was wrong. literally everything is behind a paywall.

I've used Headspace for over eight years. It used to be perfect. Now, content takes ages to load. The UI is unintuitive and is overcrowded with suggestions or therapy ads. And, if you honestly think an AI chatbot deserves to be front and center, this app has lost its way. I miss old Headspace. Mindfulness should be simple. It feels to me that this company cares more about maximizing shareholder value and being trendy than helping promote health and wellness.

app super slow and overhelming. an app that was supposed to be minimalist is just another junk of courses podcasts and other stuff.. if i wanted that i would go to youtube. it completely lost the essences. thats sad. hell ya capitalism

Headspace has gotten slow and buggy after they added Ebb and Care. Provide an option to remove them. The audio and video stops playing randomly, even the downloaded content. Headspace app and performance looks like it's going downhill.

I love the music playlists and the noise I can listen to as background noise when doing stuff, they are absolutely amazing. But the app is extremely unstable; it crashes like crazy, frequently stops, and the page loading is as slow as the landline speed in the 90s. Two stars deducted because of those. I just bought a brand new Samsung, and the issue carried over, so I can rule out the device cause. And the app is up to date. I am leaving the review because IT JUST CRASHED 4 TIMES IN A MINUTE.

another endless subscription. cant even try anything for fun its all blocked. when are we going to stand up? everything is subscription now. virus checker, photoshop, office is likely phasing out full version, we cant pay for 200 subscriptions a month. when did we give up on owning things? now everything is rented. no pay, no play

replyContent: Feedback from our community is very important to us, so we'll make sure your suggestion is passed on and heard by the right ears. We thank you for your patience as we continue to evolve and integrate new ideas to meet the needs of our members.

It is imperative that you reconsider and return the UI to how it was; the new one is not good at all. The layout of the previous one, where your day was structured, is infinitely better than the swipe right on the daily essentials that the new UI brings—it's just terrible!

Endless updates, forever changing the layout. Now introduced an AI therapist that seems to increase the loading time and even more pop-ups with suggestions that I have no interest in. Get back to basics!! And give us an experience of mindfulness and not all this corporate rubbish. Seems to have lost its core purpose - mind full Ness!!

got together with a coach to discuss things with. she would literally take 2 minutes to write " and what are you doing already in your life to deal with this " and questions like that over and over again. the process to change coach also isn't the easiest.

I can tell they care about helping us

they added ai

Headspace is the best meditation app I’ve used. The guided sessions go far beyond simple breathing or relaxation techniques, they begin and end with thoughtful insights that encourage you to see situations from fresh perspectives. This balance of practical meditation and reflective guidance feels like the real essence of learning how to cultivate genuine peace of mind.
